descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione La capacité de travailler comme Senior Key Account Manager signifie que vous prenez en charge un client stratégiquement important dans le domaine de l'infrastructure énergétique suisse. Ils opèrent dans un environnement difficile et techniquement façonné et travaillent en étroite collaboration avec des domaines spécialisés internes pour développer des solutions durables et des partenariats à long terme. Ce rôle est axé sur le soutien opérationnel et stratégique du client, y compris la gestion active des appels d'offres et des processus d'appel d'offres. Mansioni - La responsabilité d'un client stratégiquement important dans le domaine des infrastructures énergétiques suisses - Coopération avec les services internes pour le développement de solutions durables et de partenariats à long terme - Exploitation et soutien stratégique du client - Leadership des appels d'offres et processus d'appel d'offres - Interface centrale entre le client et Hitachi Energy - Assurer une performance professionnelle par Hitachi Energy contre un acteur central de l'approvisionnement énergétique suisse - Établissement et maintien de relations durables et résilientes avec les parties prenantes concernées à tous les niveaux hiérarchiques, y compris les niveaux C - Développement et mise en œuvre d'un compte client spécifique et d'une stratégie de croissance (positionnement du marché, pipeline, prévisions, environnement concurrentiel) - Coopération étroite avec les unités et les fonctions internes (ventes, ingénierie, gestion de projet, service, etc.) pour une solution optimale et une offre de conception - Application et développement de processus et d'outils de vente et de CRM normalisés (p. ex., Salesforce, plans de compte, ICR) - Leadership professionnel des appels d'offres locaux – de la stratégie d'appel d'offres à la phase de négociation à la conclusion du contrat
• Requisiti - Études universitaires complètes en génie ou qualifications comparables - Capacités de gestion supplémentaires souhaitables - Expérience à long terme dans la gestion des comptes clés ou la distribution de solutions techniques complexes, idéalement dans les domaines de la production, du transport et de la distribution d'énergie, des entreprises d'approvisionnement en énergie ou des centres de données - Connaissance du portefeuille de produits d'Hitachi Energy est souhaitable - expérience éprouvée dans la gestion de relations client complexes et dans l'élaboration et la mise en œuvre de stratégies de vente - Manoeuvre réussie dans les structures d'un grand groupe et leader du marché - Expérience acquise dans le traitement et la gestion des alertes complexes - Capacité de travailler de façon détaillée sur le plan opérationnel et d'assurer la sécurité des cadres supérieurs - Très bonne connaissance des ventes populaires, CRM et outils de bureau - Compétences linguistiques en allemand dans la parole et l'écriture; connaissance de l'anglais fluide; connaissance du français de l'avantage
• Cosa offriamo - Rôle clé dans un acteur central de l'infrastructure énergétique suisse - Espace haut de gamme avec une influence directe sur les relations d'affaires et le succès du marché - Coopération étroite avec des experts expérimentés et des décideurs au sein d'Hitachi Energy - Développement attrayant et opportunités de carrière dans une société technologique de pointe mondiale - Contribution à un approvisionnement énergétique sûr, durable et durable Contatto - [Inserisci quiere informazioni di contatto]

jobs.title: Process Technician - Implantation 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join a high performing team where your expertise truly makes an impact. As our Process Technician – Implantation you will be responsible for operating, monitoring, and maintaining advanced ion implantation processes used in semiconductor manufacturing processes This is your opportunity to shape technical decisions, contribute to long term tool strategies, and drive meaningful improvements in stability, uptime, and process performance. Are you someone who takes ownership, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and enjoys making a real impact? Then apply today! How you'll make an impact Production support for the designated area Analyze and make decision on how to release production lots (Lots on hold) Perform process top-up post machine aborts Operate and monitor ion implanters, ensuring parameters are set correctly and wafers are processed according to recipes Conduct in-process quality control checks, including visual inspections and data logging, to ensure product integrity Document and keep up-to-date all work instructions for the production personal as well as perform trainings and maintain all the training certification documentation up-to-date for the production personal Collaborate with engineering and manufacturing teams to optimize processes, improve yields, and resolve production issues Participate in continuous improvement initiatives, suggesting and implementing enhancements for production and processes Your background Associate's degree in science \/ production processes 2+ years of experience working as a process technician in a semiconductor manufacturing environment, specifically with ion implantation equipment Strong understanding of semiconductor device physics and fabrication processes Experience with various metrology tools used for in-process measurements Ability to read and interpret technical manuals Proficient in using computer-controlled equipment and data logging software German fluent, ability to communicate and read English Ability to work in a cleanroom environment and follow strict cleanroom protocols More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione L'opportunità di unire un team altamente performante in cui la vostra esperienza fa davvero un impatto. Come nostro Process Technician – Implantation, sarete responsabili per il funzionamento, il monitoraggio e il mantenimento di processi avanzati di impianto ionico utilizzati nei processi di produzione dei semiconduttori. Questa è la vostra opportunità per modellare le decisioni tecniche, contribuire a strategie di utensili a lungo termine, e guidare miglioramenti significativi nella stabilità, uptime e le prestazioni di processo. Sei qualcuno che prende la proprietà, prospera in un ambiente frenetico e gode di un impatto reale? Allora applica oggi! Come farai ad avere un impatto - Supporto di produzione per l'area designata - Analizzare e prendere decisioni su come rilasciare lotti di produzione (Lots on hold) - Esegui il processo di top-up post macchina aborti - Operare e monitorare gli impianti ioni, assicurando che i parametri siano impostati correttamente e i wafer vengono elaborati secondo le ricette - Condurre controlli di controllo della qualità del processo, inclusi controlli visivi e registrazione dei dati, per garantire l'integrità del prodotto - Documentare e mantenere aggiornate tutte le istruzioni di lavoro per la produzione personale così come eseguire allenamenti e mantenere tutta la documentazione di certificazione di formazione aggiornata per la produzione personale - Collaborare con team di progettazione e produzione per ottimizzare i processi, migliorare i rendimenti e risolvere i problemi di produzione - Partecipare a iniziative di miglioramento continuo, suggerendo e implementando miglioramenti per la produzione e i processi Il tuo sfondo - Laurea in scienze / processi produttivi - 2+ anni di esperienza che lavorano come tecnico di processo in un ambiente di produzione di semiconduttori, in particolare con l'impianto ionico - Forte comprensione dei processi di fisica e fabbricazione dei dispositivi semiconduttori - Esperienza con vari strumenti di metrologia utilizzati per le misurazioni in processo - Capacità di leggere e interpretare manuali tecnici - Proficiente nell'utilizzo di apparecchiature controllate dal computer e software di registrazione dati - fluente tedesco, capacità di comunicare e leggere l'inglese - Capacità di lavorare in un ambiente pulito e seguire rigidi protocolli di pulizia Ulteriori informazioni su di noi Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity to join a high performing team where your expertise truly makes an impact. As our Process Technician – Implantation, you will be responsible for operating, monitoring, and maintaining advanced ion implantation processes used in semiconductor manufacturing processes. This is your opportunity to shape technical decisions, contribute to long term tool strategies, and drive meaningful improvements in stability, uptime, and process performance. Are you someone who takes ownership, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and enjoys making a real impact? Then apply today! ## How you'll make an impact - Production support for the designated area - Analyze and make decisions on how to release production lots (Lots on hold) - Perform process top-up post machine aborts - Operate and monitor ion implanters, ensuring parameters are set correctly and wafers are processed according to recipes - Conduct in-process quality control checks, including visual inspections and data logging, to ensure product integrity - Document and keep up-to-date all work instructions for the production personal as well as perform trainings and maintain all the training certification documentation up-to-date for the production personal - Collaborate with engineering and manufacturing teams to optimize processes, improve yields, and resolve production issues - Participate in continuous improvement initiatives, suggesting and implementing enhancements for production and processes ## Your background - Associate's degree in science / production processes - 2+ years of experience working as a process technician in a semiconductor manufacturing environment, specifically with ion implantation equipment - Strong understanding of semiconductor device physics and fabrication processes - Experience with various metrology tools used for in-process measurements - Ability to read and interpret technical manuals - Proficient in using computer-controlled equipment and data logging software - German fluent, ability to communicate and read English - Ability to work in a cleanroom environment and follow strict cleanroom protocols ## More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Die Möglichkeit, sich einem hochleistungsfähigen Team anzuschließen, wo Ihr Know-how wirklich einen Einfluss hat. Als Process Technician – Implantation sind Sie für den Betrieb, die Überwachung und die Aufrechterhaltung fortschrittlicher Ionenimplantationsprozesse verantwortlich, die in Halbleiterherstellungsprozessen eingesetzt werden. Dies ist Ihre Chance, technische Entscheidungen zu formen, zu langfristigen Werkzeugstrategien beizutragen und sinnvolle Verbesserungen in der Stabilität, der Standzeit und der Prozessleistung zu erreichen. Sind Sie jemand, der Eigentum nimmt, in einer schnelllebigen Umgebung gedeiht und genießt eine echte Wirkung? Dann bewerben Sie sich heute! Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben - Produktionsunterstützung für die ausgewiesene Fläche - Analysieren und Entscheidungen über die Freigabe von Produktions Losen (Lots on hold) - Prozess Top-up Post Maschine abbrechen - Betrieb und Überwachung von Ionenimplantatoren, die sicherstellen, dass die Parameter korrekt eingestellt werden und Wafer nach Rezepten verarbeitet werden - Durchführung von Qualitätskontrollprüfungen im Prozess, einschließlich visueller Inspektionen und Datenerfassung, um die Integrität der Produkte zu gewährleisten - Dokumentieren und halten Sie alle Arbeitsanleitungen für die Produktion persönlich und führen Sie Schulungen durch und halten Sie alle Schulungs-Zertifizierungsdokumente aktuell für die Produktion persönlich - Mit Ingenieur- und Fertigungsteams zusammenarbeiten, um Prozesse zu optimieren, Erträge zu verbessern und Produktionsprobleme zu lösen - Beteiligen Sie sich an kontinuierlichen Verbesserungsinitiativen, die Andeutung und Umsetzung von Verbesserungen für Produktion und Prozesse Ihr Hintergrund - Studium der Wissenschaft / Produktion - 2+ Jahre Erfahrung als Prozesstechniker in einer Halbleiterbauumgebung, speziell mit Ionenimplantationsanlagen - Starkes Verständnis von Halbleiterbauelementen Physik und Fertigungsprozessen - Erfahrung mit verschiedenen Messtechnik-Werkzeugen für Prozessmessungen - Fähigkeit, technische Handbücher zu lesen und zu interpretieren - Mit computergesteuerter Geräte- und Datenerfassungssoftware kompetent - Deutsch fließend, Fähigkeit, Englisch zu kommunizieren und zu lesen - Fähigkeit, in einer Reinraumumgebung zu arbeiten und strengen Reinraumprotokollen zu folgen Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'occasion de rejoindre une équipe de haut niveau où votre expertise fait vraiment un impact. En tant que technicien en procédés – Implantation, vous serez responsable de l'exploitation, de la surveillance et du maintien des procédés avancés d'implantation d'ions utilisés dans les procédés de fabrication de semi-conducteurs. C'est l'occasion pour vous d'élaborer des décisions techniques, de contribuer à des stratégies d'outils à long terme et d'apporter des améliorations significatives à la stabilité, à la disponibilité et au rendement des processus. Êtes-vous quelqu'un qui prend possession, prospère dans un environnement rapide, et aime faire un impact réel? Alors appliquez aujourd'hui ! Comment vous ferez un impact - Appui à la production de la zone désignée - Analyser et prendre des décisions sur la façon de libérer les lots de production (Lots en attente) - Effectuer des avortations de post-machine - Opérer et surveiller les implants ioniques, s'assurer que les paramètres sont correctement définis et que les plaquettes sont traitées selon les recettes - Effectuer des contrôles de qualité en cours de fabrication, y compris des inspections visuelles et l'enregistrement des données, pour assurer l'intégrité du produit - Documenter et tenir à jour toutes les instructions de travail pour la production personnelle ainsi que les formations et tenir à jour tous les documents de certification de formation pour la production personnelle - Collaborer avec les équipes d'ingénierie et de fabrication pour optimiser les processus, améliorer les rendements et résoudre les problèmes de production - Participer à des initiatives d'amélioration continue, proposer et mettre en œuvre des améliorations pour la production et les procédés Vos antécédents - Diplôme d'associé en sciences / procédés de production - 2+ ans d'expérience en tant que technicien de process dans un environnement de fabrication de semi-conducteurs, en particulier avec des équipements d'implantation ionique - Une bonne compréhension de la physique des dispositifs semi-conducteurs et des procédés de fabrication - Expérience des divers outils de métrologie utilisés pour les mesures en cours de fabrication - Capacité de lire et d'interpréter les manuels techniques - Compétence dans l'utilisation d'équipements contrôlés par ordinateur et de logiciels d'enregistrement de données - Allemand couramment, capacité de communiquer et de lire l'anglais - Capacité de travailler dans un environnement propre et de suivre des protocoles stricts de salle propre Plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et professionnelle tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Internship in Computational Chemistry 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description:
The opportunity The design of high voltage (HV) devices, such as gas circuit breakers (CB) and gas insulated switchgear (GIS), requires – among others –simulations and experiments for verification of insulation and switching performance. Additionally, the research activities in the area of gas circuit breakers are enhanced by various computer-aided-engineering tools. We are looking for an intern student with expertise in computational chemistry to contribute to the development of novel insulating materials for high-voltage power grid applications. The superior goal is the achievement of high-end quality of the product. The duration of the internship is 6 to 12 months.    How you'll make an impact  Contribute to technology development and research activities focusing on material analysis and characterization  Support simulations of gas insulation systems using state of the art computational chemistry packages  Study the relationship between microstructure and material characteristics and document findings and present test results to the team    Your background B.Sc. degree in Material Science, Chemistry, Physics or similar discipline with focus on computer-aided methods  Programming skills and experience in computational chemistry is an advantage  Fluency in written and spoken English  Team player and well organized  Creative and able to work autonomously  Laboratory and experimental experience is a plus  More about us We are a technology‑driven company with a strong focus on innovation, continuous improvement, and sustainable manufacturing. 
• We offer flexible working conditions, dedicated mentorship, and a supportive, inclusive environment where you can grow personally and professionally – empowering you to thrive while balancing life and work.

jobs.title: SAP Business Unit Lead Service
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy is searching for an expert SAP Business Analyst who can bridge business needs and technology by driving end-to-end ERP solutions. This role involves analyzing requirements, defining scope, and translating complex business processes into SAP module specifications, while recommending improvements that enhance efficiency and performance. As a recognized subject matter expert, you'll shape operational plans, influence leadership, and lead the development of innovative processes and standards that deliver measurable impact. Strong communication skills and the ability to align stakeholders with strategic objectives are essential for success. How you'll make an impact Establish governance and organizational frameworks  to ensure clear roles, responsibilities, and decision-making aligned with global strategies. Provide strategic oversight for global programs , ensuring adherence to standardized processes and full adoption of core systems. Gather and analyze business requirements , synthesizing input from stakeholders to align with business goals. Manage BU demand funnel toward SAP CoE  in line with business archetype. Lead process harmonization and continuous improvement , eliminating template deviations and promoting best practices across regions. Monitor business process performance  through key metrics, data analysis, and benchmarking against industry standards. Drive data governance and management , ensuring accuracy, consistency, and security across HUBs and systems. Assess and address training needs , delivering resources and sessions to enhance team competencies and performance. Champion change management initiatives , promoting global process adoption, minimizing local customizations, and securing stakeholder buy-in. Identify and mitigate risks  related to system implementations and process changes, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements. Lead and develop global teams , fostering accountability, collaboration, and professional growth through coaching and performance management. Collaborate on budget and demand planning , share best practices, and maintain regular communication with BU management. Your background Degree in Information Technology, Engineering, Business Administration, or related field. Minimum of 10 years of progressive experience in manufacturing, operations management, or related roles, with a proven track record of leading cross-functional teams and managing global projects. Strong leadership and change management skills, with the ability to influence and motivate global teams and stakeholders. In-depth knowledge of manufacturing, sales, logistics, service processes, systems, and process improvement methodologies (Lean, Six Sigma). Excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills, capable of effectively conveying complex concepts and securing buy-in at all organizational levels. Analytical mindset with the ability to leverage data for performance monitoring, decision-making, and continuous improvement initiatives.

titleByLocale.it: Servizio Lead delle Unità di Business SAP
titleByLocale.fr: Service chef de file de l'unité opérationnelle SAP

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione L'opportunità Hitachi Energy è alla ricerca di un esperto SAP Business Analyst che può colmare le esigenze aziendali e la tecnologia guidando soluzioni ERP end-to-end. Questo ruolo consiste nell'analisi dei requisiti, nella definizione del campo di applicazione e nella traduzione di complessi processi aziendali nelle specifiche del modulo SAP, raccomandando al contempo miglioramenti che migliorano l'efficienza e le prestazioni. Come esperto di materia riconosciuta, formerai piani operativi, influenzerai la leadership e guiderai lo sviluppo di processi e standard innovativi che offrono un impatto misurabile. Le forti capacità di comunicazione e la capacità di allineare gli stakeholder con obiettivi strategici sono essenziali per il successo. Condividi su Twitter - Stabilire strutture di governance e organizzazione per garantire ruoli chiari, responsabilità e processi decisionali allineati alle strategie globali. - Fornire una supervisione strategica per i programmi globali, assicurando l'adesione a processi standardizzati e l'adozione completa di sistemi core. - Raccogliere e analizzare i requisiti aziendali, sintetizzare gli input da parte degli stakeholder per allineare con gli obiettivi aziendali. - Gestisci l'imbuto della domanda BU verso SAP CoE in linea con l'archetipo aziendale. - Armonizzazione del processo di piombo e miglioramento continuo, eliminando deviazioni dei modelli e promuovendo le migliori pratiche in tutte le regioni. - Monitorare le prestazioni del processo aziendale attraverso metriche chiave, analisi dei dati e benchmarking rispetto agli standard del settore. - Guidare la governance e la gestione dei dati, garantendo precisione, coerenza e sicurezza attraverso HUB e sistemi. - Valutare e affrontare le esigenze di formazione, fornire risorse e sessioni per migliorare le competenze e le prestazioni del team. - Iniziative di gestione del cambiamento del campione, promozione dell'adozione del processo globale, minimizzazione delle personalizzazione locali, e garantire il buy-in degli stakeholder. - Identificare e mitigare i rischi relativi alle implementazioni del sistema e alle modifiche dei processi, garantendo la conformità ai requisiti normativi. - Guidare e sviluppare team globali, promuovere la responsabilità, la collaborazione e la crescita professionale attraverso coaching e la gestione delle prestazioni. - Collaborare sulla pianificazione del budget e della domanda, condividere le migliori pratiche e mantenere la comunicazione regolare con la gestione BU.
• Requisiti - Laurea in Informatica, Ingegneria, Business Administration o campo relativo. - Minimo di 10 anni di esperienza progressiva nella produzione, nella gestione delle operazioni o in ruoli correlati, con una comprovata traccia dei principali team interfunzionali e la gestione di progetti globali. - Forte leadership e capacità di gestione dei cambiamenti, con la capacità di influenzare e motivare team e stakeholder globali. - Conoscenza approfondita delle metodologie di produzione, vendita, logistica, servizi, sistemi e miglioramento dei processi (Lean, Six Sigma). - Eccellente capacità di comunicazione e coinvolgimento degli stakeholder, in grado di trasmettere efficacemente concetti complessi e garantire buy-in a tutti i livelli organizzativi. - Mindset analitico con la capacità di sfruttare i dati per il monitoraggio delle prestazioni, il processo decisionale e le iniziative di miglioramento continuo. Cosa? - Opportunità di crescita professionale e personale. - Ambiente di lavoro stimolante e collaborativo. - Benefici competitività e vantaggious. Contatto - [Inserisci qui i di contatto, come email o numero di telefono]

This role involves analyzing requirements, defining scope, and translating complex business processes into SAP module specifications, while recommending improvements that enhance efficiency and performance. As a recognized subject matter expert, you'll shape operational plans, influence leadership, and lead the development of innovative processes and standards that deliver measurable impact. Strong communication skills and the ability to align stakeholders with strategic objectives are essential for success. ## Come farai un impatto - Establish governance and organizational frameworks to ensure clear roles, responsibilities, and decision-making aligned with global strategies. - Provide strategic oversight for global programs, ensuring adherence to standardized processes and full adoption of core systems. - Gather and analyze business requirements, synthesizing input from stakeholders to align with business goals. - Manage BU demand funnel toward SAP CoE in line with business archetype. - Lead process harmonization and continuous improvement, eliminating template deviations and promoting best practices across regions. - Monitor business process performance through key metrics, data analysis, and benchmarking against industry standards. - Drive data governance and management, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and security across HUBs and systems. - Assess and address training needs, delivering resources and sessions to enhance team competencies and performance. - Champion change management initiatives, promoting global process adoption, minimizing local customizations, and securing stakeholder buy-in. - Identify and mitigate risks related to system implementations and process changes, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements. - Lead and develop global teams, fostering accountability, collaboration, and professional growth through coaching and performance management. - Collaborate on budget and demand planning, share best practices, and maintain regular communication with BU management. ##

descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung Die Gelegenheit Hitachi Energy sucht einen kompetenten SAP Business Analyst, der die geschäftlichen Bedürfnisse und Technologien durch das Fahren von End-to-End-ERP-Lösungen überbrücken kann. Diese Rolle besteht darin,
• Anforderungen zu analysieren, den Umfang zu definieren und komplexe Geschäftsprozesse in SAP-Modulspezifikationen zu übersetzen und Verbesserungen zu empfehlen, die Effizienz und Leistungsfähigkeit verbessern. Als anerkannter Fachexperte gestalten Sie operative Pläne, beeinflussen die Führung und führen die Entwicklung innovativer Prozesse und Standards, die messbare Auswirkungen liefern. Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und die Fähigkeit, Stakeholder mit strategischen Zielen auszurichten, sind für den Erfolg unerlässlich. Come farai un impatto - Schaffung von Governance- und Organisationsrahmen, um klare Rollen, Verantwortlichkeiten und Entscheidungsfindung im Einklang mit globalen Strategien zu gewährleisten. - Bereitstellung strategischer Aufsicht für globale Programme, Sicherstellung der Einhaltung standardisierter Prozesse und der vollständigen Einführung von Kernsystemen. - Gewinnen und analysieren Sie die Geschäftsanforderungen und synthetisieren Sie die Eingabe von Stakeholdern, um sich mit Geschäftszielen auszurichten. - Verwalten Sie BU-Anforderungstrichter in Richtung SAP CoE im Einklang mit Geschäftsbogentyp. - Leitende Prozessharmonisierung und kontinuierliche Verbesserung, Beseitigung von Musterabweichungen und Förderung von Best Practices in Regionen. - Überwachen Sie die Performance der Geschäftsprozesse durch wichtige Kennzahlen, Datenanalyse und Benchmarking gegen Industriestandards. - Führen Sie die Datenverwaltung und -verwaltung aus, sorgen Sie für Genauigkeit, Konsistenz und Sicherheit über HUBs und Systeme. - Assess und die Bedürfnisse der Schulungen, die Bereitstellung von Ressourcen und Sitzungen, um Teamfähigkeiten und Leistung zu verbessern. - Champion Change Management-Initiativen, die Förderung der globalen Prozessannahme, die Minimierung lokaler Anpassungen und die Sicherung von Stakeholder Buy-in. - Ermittlung und Minderung von Risiken im Zusammenhang mit Systemumsetzungen und Prozessänderungen, um die Einhaltung regulatorischer
• Anforderungen zu gewährleisten. - Führen und entwickeln globale Teams, fördern Rechenschaftspflicht, Zusammenarbeit und professionelles Wachstum durch Coaching und Leistungsmanagement. - Zusammenarbeit bei der Budget- und Nachfrageplanung, der Austausch bewährter Praktiken und der regelmäßigen Kommunikation mit dem BU-Management. Voraussetzungen - Studium der Informatik, Ingenieurwesen, Betriebswirtschaft oder verwandten Bereich. - Mindestens 10 Jahre fortschrittliche Erfahrung in der Fertigung, im Betriebsmanagement oder in verwandten Rollen, mit einem nachgewiesenen Erfolgsrekord führender funktionsübergreifender Teams und der Verwaltung globaler Projekte. - Starke Führungs- und Change-Management-Fähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, globale Teams und Interessenvertreter zu beeinflussen und zu motivieren. - Vertiefte Kenntnisse über Fertigungs-, Verkaufs-, Logistik-, Service-, System- und Prozessverbesserungsmethoden (Lean, Six Sigma). - Ausgezeichnete Kommunikations- und Stakeholder-Verlobungskompetenzen, die in der Lage sind, komplexe Konzepte effektiv zu fördern und den Buy-in auf allen organisatorischen Ebenen zu sichern. - Analytische Denkweise mit der Fähigkeit, Daten für Leistungsüberwachung, Entscheidungsfindung und kontinuierliche Verbesserungsinitiativen zu nutzen.
• Cosa offriamo - Opportunità di crescita professionale e personale. - Ambiente di lavoro stimolante e collaborativo. - Benefici competitivi e vantaggious. Contattoo - [Inserisci qui i dettagli di contatto, come email o numero di telefono]
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione L'occasion Hitachi Energy est à la recherche d'un expert SAP Business Analyste qui peut combler les besoins et la technologie en conduisant des solutions ERP de bout en bout. Ce rôle consiste à analyser les exigences, à définir la portée et à traduire les processus opérationnels complexes en spécifications de modules SAP, tout en recommandant des améliorations qui améliorent l'efficacité et le rendement. En tant qu'expert reconnu en la matière, vous façonnerez des plans opérationnels, influencerez le leadership et dirigerez l'élaboration de processus et de normes innovateurs qui produisent un impact mesurable. Pour réussir, il est essentiel de posséder de solides compétences en communication et de pouvoir aligner les intervenants sur les objectifs stratégiques. Venez loin un impatto - Établir des cadres de gouvernance et d'organisation pour assurer des rôles, des responsabilités et des processus décisionnels clairs, alignés sur les stratégies mondiales. - Assurer la surveillance stratégique des programmes mondiaux, assurer le respect des processus normalisés et l'adoption complète des systèmes de base. - Rassembler et analyser les besoins opérationnels, synthétiser les commentaires des intervenants afin de les aligner sur les objectifs opérationnels. - Gérer l'entonnoir de demande BU vers SAP CoE en ligne avec l'archétype d'affaires. - Coordonner l'harmonisation des processus et l'amélioration continue, éliminer les écarts entre les modèles et promouvoir les meilleures pratiques dans les régions. - Surveiller le rendement des processus opérationnels au moyen de mesures clés, d'analyses de données et d'analyse comparative par rapport aux normes de l'industrie. - Diriger la gouvernance et la gestion des données, en assurant la précision, la cohérence et la sécurité dans les HUB et les systèmes. - Évaluer et répondre aux besoins de formation, fournir des ressources et des séances pour améliorer les compétences et le rendement de l'équipe. - Promouvoir les initiatives de gestion du changement, promouvoir l'adoption de processus mondiaux, minimiser les personnalisations locales et obtenir l'adhésion des intervenants. - Déterminer et atténuer les risques liés à la mise en oeuvre du système et aux changements de processus, en veillant au respect des exigences réglementaires. - Diriger et développer des équipes mondiales, favoriser la responsabilisation, la collaboration et la croissance professionnelle par l'encadrement et la gestion du rendement. - Collaborer à la planification du budget et de la demande, partager les meilleures pratiques et maintenir une communication régulière avec la direction de l'UB.
• Requisiti - Diplôme en technologie de l'information, génie, administration des affaires, ou domaine connexe. - Au moins 10 ans d'expérience progressive dans la fabrication, la gestion d'exploitation ou des rôles connexes, avec une expérience éprouvée de la direction d'équipes interfonctionnelles et de la gestion de projets mondiaux. - De solides compétences en leadership et en gestion du changement, avec la capacité d'influencer et de motiver les équipes et les parties prenantes mondiales. - Connaissance approfondie de la fabrication, des ventes, de la logistique, des processus de service, des systèmes et des méthodes d'amélioration des procédés (Lean, Six Sigma). - Excellentes compétences en communication et engagement des parties prenantes, capables de transmettre efficacement des concepts complexes et d'obtenir l'adhésion à tous les niveaux organisationnels. - Un état d'esprit analytique capable de tirer parti des données pour la surveillance du rendement, la prise de décisions et les initiatives d'amélioration continue.
• Cosa offriamo - Opportunità di crescita professionnelle e personnelle. - Ambiente di lavoro stimolante e collarativo. - Benefici competivi e vantaggious. Contatto - [Inserisci qui i dettagli di contatto, come email o numero di telefono]

titleByLocale.it: GPG Isolamento e componenti APQP Leader

descriptionByLocale.it: The Opportunity As an GPG Insulation & Components APQP Leader you will be responsible for the implementation and maintenance of Foundation APQP essentials, according to the defined strategy and plan for GPG I&C Quality. You will collaborate with crossfunctional teams ensuring that Foundation APQP essentials are updated according to novelties and new risks. How you´ll make an impact Coordinate the development of Foundation APQP plan. Lead foundation APQP Plan related meetings, collecting and preparing documentation, being main connection point between QMT, Factories, Global experts and R&D. Participate in Foundation FMEA workshops and s upport HUBs and Factories to use foundation APQP essentials (to be cascaded to local products). Support R&D organization to use foundation APQP essentials for new product developments. Support ToT projects to ensure proper transfer of APQP essentials. Act as GPG I&C Plato Admin, train crossfunctional teams, support the organization on the usage and ensure that foundation content is updated . Proactive identification of technology novelties to drive updates in foundation APQP essentials and c ollaborate with GPG Operations to identify global process changes that might affect to foundation APQP essentials ( e.g. from best practices to requirement). Your b ackground Technical degree from the University . 3-5 years of experience with APQP ( preferably in industries like Automotive or Wind). Strong knowledge of APQP processes, FMEA, PPAP, SPC, and MSA methodologies. Experience with Plato is an advatage . Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to identify and implement process improvements. Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams and facilitate effective collaboration among diverse stakeholders. Fluency in English What w e o ffer Collective agreement and flexible working hours. Health care and wellness allowance. Career opportunities within Hitachi Energ y, locally and globally. Mentor support during onboarding. Training and development programs. A diverse workplace with 70+ nationalities in Sweden. Supplementary parental leave compensation. Access to an Employee Benefit Portal with discounts. More a bout u s At Hitachi Energy, you'll work in an exciting, collaborative environment delivering world-class technology. We value personal development and diversity, and we are committed to building a sustainable energy future. We are growing and welcome applicants who may not meet every requirement—your potential matters. Applications are reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don't wait—apply today! For questions about the position, contact Recruiting Manager Yolanda Villaseca at yolanda.villaseca@hitachienergy.com . Union representatives: Sveriges Ingenjörer : Håkan Blomquist +46 107-38 31 52 , Ledarna : Frank Hollstedt +46 107 38 70 42 . All other questions can be directed to Talent Partner Michael Blomberg , michael.blomberg@hitachienergy.com

jobs.title: High Voltage Testing Engineer 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Our local product group Insulation & Components is a global technology leader in the design and manufacture of high-voltage transformer bushings. Renowned international companies across the electrical industry—including power generation, transmission, and distribution—trust our solutions. We hold a leading worldwide position in high-voltage bushing technology. To strengthen our operations, we are looking for a High Voltage Testing Engineer to join our high-voltage testing team at our MICAFIL bushing factory. If you are passionate about high-voltage testing and want to actively contribute to the future of our production processes, this is your opportunity to make a real impact. How you'll make an impact Plan and execute electrical and thermal type tests as well as special tests on high-voltage bushings (in-house and externally), considering available resources and budget Assist and lead Factory Acceptance Tests (FATs), including in-house FATs with customers Ensure the full functionality and availability of three high-voltage laboratories in collaboration with the team Lead and manage laboratory-related projects Ensure safety of equipment and personnel through training, instructions, and compliance with safety standards Secure quality, traceability, and compliance of bushing process steps through process instructions Perform routine, type, and special tests as required Continuously challenge and improve procedures and instructions as part of Continuous Improvement Processes (CIP) As part of the Operations department, actively support and contribute to daily business activities Your background Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering or equivalent Professional experience in high-voltage technology, testing, or electrical machines, ideally in a production or industrial environment Solid understanding of ISO 9001 and ISO 17025 Business-fluent German and good English, both written and spoken Strong team spirit, high social competence, and enjoyment of working in a multicultural environment Flexible mindset with a strong enthusiasm for technology Proactive and solution-oriented approach to problem-solving More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione L'opportunità Il nostro gruppo di prodotti locale Insulation & Components è un leader tecnologico globale nella progettazione e produzione di boccole per trasformatori ad alta tensione. Rinomate aziende internazionali nell'industria elettrica, tra cui la generazione di energia, la trasmissione e la distribuzione, si affidano alle nostre soluzioni. Abbiamo una posizione leader a livello mondiale nella tecnologia di boccole ad alta tensione. Per rafforzare le nostre operazioni, stiamo cercando un ingegnere ad alta tensione per unirsi al nostro team di test ad alta tensione presso la nostra fabbrica di boccole MICAFIL. Se siete appassionati di test ad alta tensione e volete contribuire attivamente al futuro dei nostri processi produttivi, questa è la vostra opportunità di fare un impatto reale. Mansioni - Pianificare ed eseguire test di tipo elettrico e termico e test speciali su boccole ad alta tensione (in-house ed esternamente), considerando le risorse disponibili e il bilancio - Test di accettazione della fabbrica di assistenza e di piombo (FAT), compresi i FAT interni con i clienti - Assicurare la piena funzionalità e disponibilità di tre laboratori ad alta tensione in collaborazione con il team - Guidare e gestire progetti di laboratorio - Assicurare la sicurezza delle attrezzature e del personale attraverso la formazione, le istruzioni e il rispetto degli standard di sicurezza - Qualità sicura, tracciabilità e conformità dei passaggi del processo di boccola attraverso le istruzioni di processo - Eseguire test di routine, tipo e speciali come richiesto - Sfida e migliora continuamente le procedure e le istruzioni nell'ambito dei processi di miglioramento continuo (CIP) - Nell'ambito del reparto Operazioni, sostenere attivamente e contribuire alle attività aziendali quotidiane 
• Requisiti - Corso di laurea o master in ingegneria elettrica o equivalente - Esperienza professionale in tecnologia ad alta tensione, test o macchine elettriche, idealmente in ambiente produttivo o industriale - Solida comprensione di ISO 9001 e ISO 17025 - Tedesco fluente e buon inglese, sia scritto che parlato - Forte spirito di squadra, alta competenza sociale, e il piacere di lavorare in un ambiente multiculturale - Mindset flessibile con un forte entusiasmo per la tecnologia - Approccio proattivo e orientato alla soluzione al problem solving Cosa? - Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione The opportunity Our local product group Insulation & Components is a global technology leader in the design and manufacture of high-voltage transformer bushings. Renowned international companies across the electrical industry—including power generation, transmission, and distribution—trust our solutions. We hold a leading worldwide position in high-voltage bushing technology. To strengthen our operations, we are looking for a High Voltage Testing Engineer to join our high-voltage testing team at our MICAFIL bushing factory. If you are passionate about high-voltage testing and want to actively contribute to the future of our production processes, this is your opportunity to make a real impact. ## Mansioni - Plan and execute electrical and thermal type tests as well as special tests on high-voltage bushings (in-house and externally), considering available resources and budget - Assist and lead Factory Acceptance Tests (FATs), including in-house FATs with customers - Ensure the full functionality and availability of three high-voltage laboratories in collaboration with the team - Lead and manage laboratory-related projects - Ensure safety of equipment and personnel through training, instructions, and compliance with safety standards - Secure quality, traceability, and compliance of bushing process steps through process instructions - Perform routine, type, and special tests as required - Continuously challenge and improve procedures and instructions as part of Continuous Improvement Processes (CIP) - As part of the Operations department, actively support and contribute to daily business activities ## 
• Requisiti - Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering or equivalent - Professional experience in high-voltage technology, testing, or electrical machines, ideally in a production or industrial environment - Solid understanding of ISO 9001 and ISO 17025 - Business-fluent German and good English, both written and spoken - Strong team spirit, high social competence, and enjoyment of working in a multicultural environment - Flexible mindset with a strong enthusiasm for technology - Proactive and solution-oriented approach to problem-solving ## 
• Cosa offriamo - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung Die Gelegenheit Unsere lokale Produktgruppe Insulation & Komponenten ist ein weltweit führender Technologieführer bei der Konstruktion und Herstellung von Hochspannungstransformatorenbuchsen. Renommierte internationale Unternehmen in der gesamten Elektroindustrie – einschließlich Stromerzeugung, Übertragung und Vertrieb – vertrauen unsere Lösungen. Wir halten eine weltweit führende Position in der Hochspannungsbuchsentechnologie. Um unsere Operationen zu stärken, suchen wir einen Hochspannungsprüfer, der in unserem MICAFIL-Buchstabenwerk mit unserem Hochspannungsprüfteam zusammenarbeitet. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich über Hochspannungstests sind und aktiv zur Zukunft unserer Produktionsprozesse beitragen wollen, ist dies Ihre Chance, einen echten Einfluss zu entfalten. Mansion - Planung und Durchführung von elektrischen und thermischen Tests sowie Spezialtests an Hochspannungsdurchführungen (in-house und extern), unter Berücksichtigung der verfügbaren Ressourcen und des Budgets - Assist und Lead Factory Acceptance Tests (FATs), einschließlich interner FATs mit Kunden - Sicherstellung der vollen Funktionalität und Verfügbarkeit von drei Hochspannungslaboren in Zusammenarbeit mit dem Team - Führen und verwalten von Laborprojekten - Gewährleistung der Sicherheit von Ausrüstung und Personal durch Schulung, Anleitung und Einhaltung von Sicherheitsstandards - Sichere Qualität, Rückverfolgbarkeit und Einhaltung von Durchführungsprozessen durch Prozessanweisungen - Durchführung von Routine-, Typ- und Sondertests nach Bedarf - Kontinuierliche Herausforderung und Verbesserung der Prozeduren und Anweisungen im Rahmen von Continuous Improvement Processes (CIP) - Im Rahmen der Betriebsabteilung aktiv Unterstützung und Beitrag zur täglichen Geschäftstätigkeit Voraussetzungen - Bachelor- oder Masterstudium Elektrotechnik oder gleichwertig - Berufserfahrung in Hochvolt-, Prüf- oder Elektromaschinen, ideal in Produktions- oder Industrieumgebungen - Solides Verständnis von ISO 9001 und ISO 17025 - Business-fluent Deutsch und gute Englisch, sowohl geschrieben als auch gesprochen - Starker Teamgeist, hohe soziale Kompetenz und Freude am Arbeiten in einem multikulturellen Umfeld - Flexibel mit einem starken Enthusiasmus für Technologie - Proaktiver und lösungsorientierter Ansatz zur Problemlösung 
• Cosa offriamo - Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione L'opportunité Notre groupe de produits local Isolation & Components est un leader technologique mondial dans la conception et la fabrication de douilles de transformateurs haute tension. Des entreprises internationales renommées dans l'industrie électrique – y compris la production, le transport et la distribution d'électricité – font confiance à nos solutions. Nous détenons une position de leader mondial dans la technologie de douille haute tension. Pour renforcer nos opérations, nous cherchons un ingénieur de test haute tension pour rejoindre notre équipe de test haute tension dans notre usine de douille MICAFIL. Si vous êtes passionné par les tests à haute tension et que vous voulez contribuer activement à l'avenir de nos processus de production, c'est l'occasion de faire un impact réel. Mansioni - Planifier et exécuter des essais de type électrique et thermique ainsi que des essais spéciaux sur les douilles haute tension (internes et externes), compte tenu des ressources disponibles et du budget - Assister et diriger les essais d'acceptation des usines (TAF), y compris les TAF internes avec les clients - Assurer la pleine fonctionnalité et la disponibilité de trois laboratoires à haute tension en collaboration avec l'équipe - Diriger et gérer des projets liés aux laboratoires - Assurer la sécurité des équipements et du personnel grâce à la formation, aux instructions et au respect des normes de sécurité - Sécurisation de la qualité, de la traçabilité et de la conformité des étapes du processus de douille à travers les instructions du processus - Effectuer des tests de routine, de type et spéciaux au besoin - Défier et améliorer continuellement les procédures et les instructions dans le cadre des processus d'amélioration continue (PIC) - Dans le cadre du service des opérations, soutenir activement et contribuer aux activités quotidiennes 
• Requisiti - Baccalauréat ou maîtrise en génie électrique ou équivalent - Expérience professionnelle dans la technologie haute tension, les essais ou les machines électriques, idéalement dans un environnement de production ou industriel - Bonne compréhension des normes ISO 9001 et ISO 17025 - L'allemand riche en affaires et l'anglais bon, écrits et parlés - Un esprit d'équipe fort, une grande compétence sociale et la jouissance de travailler dans un environnement multiculturel - Un état d'esprit flexible avec un vif enthousiasme pour la technologie - Approche proactive et axée sur la solution des problèmes 
• Cosa offriamo - Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir

jobs.title: Global Data, Analytics and Artificial Intelligence - BU Transformers
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy is seeking a Global Data, Analytics and Artificial Intelligence Manager for the Business Unit Transformers to join our team shaping the future of energy through digital innovation, data‑driven insights, and AI‑enabled solutions. In this role, you will drive data‑ and AI‑enabled value creation by converting business strategy into prioritized AI initiatives, ensuring measurable impact across operations, decision‑making, and innovation. This position offers the opportunity to grow your career within the newly established Digital Transformation Organization, collaborate with global stakeholders, and shape the future of Transformer solutions. How you will make an impact Shape the future of data, analytics, and AI by setting a clear strategic direction that drives meaningful business outcomes at scale. Turn real business challenges into AI opportunities that improve decisions, performance, and competitive advantage. Build and lead a high‑impact AI portfolio, taking ideas from early concepts to scaled solutions that create measurable value. Champion responsible and trusted AI by embedding strong governance, ethics, and data standards into everything delivered. Elevate data as a strategic asset by improving quality, consistency, and access to enable powerful insights and AI solutions. Lead diverse, cross‑functional teams to deliver AI initiatives that are practical, scalable, and business‑ready. Learn from results to continuously refine approaches, scale successes, and amplify business impact. Build strong partnerships with business and digital leaders to align priorities and accelerate AI adoption. Strengthen organizational capabilities through targeted learning, clear messaging, and a strong data‑driven mindset. Drive change with confidence by guiding stakeholders through transformation and ensuring responsible adoption of new solutions. Inspire, develop, and grow high‑performing Data, Analytics, and AI teams aligned behind a shared vision. Your background Master's degree in computer science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field. Relevant certifications (e.g., CAIP, advanced AI\/ML certifications) highly valued. jobs.title: Engineering Global Sustainability Leader
jobs.location: Remote - North Carolina, United States of America
jobs.description:
The opportunity Sustainability starts at the design table—and this role puts you right at the center of that impact. As the Engineering Design Sustainability Lead , you will shape how sustainability is embedded into global engineering decisions across our transformer business. This is a highly visible, strategic role where engineering excellence meets environmental responsibility. You will lead the shift from downstream sustainability activities to design‑led outcomes, ensuring product‑level carbon reduction, material optimization, and environmental performance are built into every design choice from the outset. You will work across global engineering teams to translate sustainability ambitions into measurable, auditable product outcomes—balancing cost, safety, quality, and performance. With increasing expectations from customers, regulators, and stakeholders for credible product‑level data, your work will directly support compliance, ESG reporting, and long‑term business resilience. If you thrive at the intersection of engineering, data, and sustainability—and enjoy influencing without direct authority—this role offers a unique opportunity to shape the future of sustainable product design at scale. How you'll make an impact Define and drive a global, design‑led sustainability strategy within Engineering. Embed sustainability into engineering standards, processes, and decision frameworks. Reduce product‑level carbon footprint through smart design, material, and architecture choices. Establish sustainability targets, KPIs, and traceable product‑level data at BOM level. Partner across engineering, R&D, supply chain, digital and operations teams globally. Strengthen governance, reporting, and audit‑ready sustainability metrics. Build capability and foster ownership of sustainable design within engineering teams. Translate regulatory and customer sustainability expectations into engineering requirements. Responsible to ensure compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines. Your background Master's degree or PhD in Engineering or a closely related sustainability discipline. 10+ years of engineering experience, including 5+ years in sustainability‑focused roles. Proven success delivering design‑led sustainability or product carbon reduction initiatives. Strong knowledge of lifecycle assessment, sustainable materials, and carbon accounting. Experience leading global, cross‑functional initiatives and influencing senior stakeholders. Strong analytical mindset with a data‑driven approach to decision‑making. More about us At Hitachi Energy , sustainability, innovation, and safety are core to how we design the future of energy. You'll work in a global, diverse environment where ideas are valued and impact is visible. 
• We offer meaningful opportunities to grow, lead, and shape industry‑leading solutions with purpose.

jobs.title: Project Engineer - Grid Automation Control & Protection 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity To strengthen our team, we are looking for a Project Engineer – Grid Automation Control & Protection to support the successful delivery of grid automation projects across Europe. In this role, you will collaborate closely with project management, fellow engineering teams, and customers to deliver the control and protection scope of complex substation automation projects. You will be part of a world class engineering community within our European Hub, working alongside experienced colleagues with deep expertise in the execution of large and technically demanding projects worldwide. This position offers an excellent environment to learn, grow, and make a meaningful contribution to Hitachi Energy's purpose of advancing a sustainable, flexible, and secure energy system. It is a unique opportunity to join the energy transition at a time when electricity is increasingly becoming the backbone of a sustainable society. How you'll make an impact Collaborate with the project core team to develop protection and control concepts for (sub-)transmission systems, working closely with customers during the base design phase Contribute to and coordinate the Protection & Control detailed engineering scope, working in close alignment with other engineering disciplines such as SCADA and Network & Cyber Security Support the design and\/or configuration of protection and control IEDs for (sub-)transmission substations, ensuring solutions meet customer specifications Participate in and help lead factory testing activities at our test facilities in Baden (Switzerland), including Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT) carried out in partnership with customers Your background Bachelor's degree in electrical engineering or equivalent (e.g. Technikerschule), with relevant experience in substation automation systems Knowledge of substation control and protection systems, including communication standards such as IEC 61850 Experience with Hitachi Energy's protection and control IED portfolio (Relion® family) is an advantage Open-minded team player with a strong focus on customer satisfaction, safety, quality, and efficiency Ability to work independently while effectively coordinating with multiple stakeholders in a project environment Strong communication skills and the confidence to take technical decisions Fluent in English, both written and spoken, German language is an advantage More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Project Ingegnere - Grid Automation Control & Protection 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.en: Project Engineer - Grid Automation Control & Protection 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.de: Project Ingenieur - Grid Automation Control & Protection 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.fr: Project Ingénieur - Grid Automation Control & Protection 80 - 100% (f/m/d)

descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione L'opportunità Per rafforzare il nostro team, siamo alla ricerca di un Project Engineer – Grid Automation Control & Protection per supportare la riuscita consegna di progetti di automazione della rete in tutta Europa. In questo ruolo, collaborerai a stretto contatto con la gestione dei progetti, i team di ingegneria e i clienti per fornire il campo di controllo e di protezione di complessi progetti di automazione delle sottostazione. Sarete parte di una comunità di ingegneria di livello mondiale all'interno del nostro hub europeo, lavorando insieme a colleghi esperti con profonda esperienza nell'esecuzione di progetti di grandi e tecnicamente impegnati in tutto il mondo. Questa posizione offre un ambiente eccellente per imparare, crescere e dare un contributo significativo allo scopo di Hitachi Energy di promuovere un sistema energetico sostenibile, flessibile e sicuro. È un'occasione unica per unire la transizione energetica in un momento in cui l'elettricità sta diventando sempre più la spina dorsale di una società sostenibile. # Come farai un impatto # - Collaborare con il team di progettazione per sviluppare concetti di protezione e controllo per sistemi di trasmissione (sotto), lavorando a stretto contatto con i clienti durante la fase di progettazione di base - Contribuire e coordinare l'ambito tecnico dettagliato di Protezione e Controllo, lavorando in stretto allineamento con altre discipline ingegneristiche come SCADA e Network & Cyber Security - Sostenere la progettazione e/o la configurazione di protezione e controllo IED per le sottostazioni di trasmissione (sotto) garantendo soluzioni conformi alle specifiche del cliente - Partecipare e aiutare a condurre le attività di test di fabbrica presso le nostre strutture di test a Baden (Svizzera), tra cui i test di accettazione di fabbrica (FAT) effettuati in collaborazione con i clienti # Il tuo sfondo # - Corso di laurea in ingegneria elettrica o equivalente (ad esempio Technikerschule), con esperienza rilevante nei sistemi di automazione sottostazione - Conoscenza dei sistemi di controllo e protezione delle sottostazione, compresi gli standard di comunicazione come IEC 61850 - L'esperienza con il portafoglio IED di protezione e controllo di Hitachi Energy (famiglia Relion®) è un vantaggio - Giocatore di squadra con una forte attenzione alla soddisfazione del cliente, alla sicurezza, alla qualità e all'efficienza - Capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente, coordinando efficacemente con più stakeholder in un ambiente di progetto - Forte capacità di comunicazione e fiducia nel prendere decisioni tecniche - Fluente in inglese, sia scritto che parlato, la lingua tedesca è un vantaggio ## More about us Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity To strengthen our team, we are looking for a Project Engineer – Grid Automation Control & Protection to support the successful delivery of grid automation projects across Europe. In this role, you will collaborate closely with project management, fellow engineering teams, and customers to deliver the control and protection scope of complex substation automation projects. You will be part of a world class engineering community within our European Hub, working alongside experienced colleagues with deep expertise in the execution of large and technically demanding projects worldwide. This position offers an excellent environment to learn, grow, and make a meaningful contribution to Hitachi Energy's purpose of advancing a sustainable, flexible, and secure energy system. It is a unique opportunity to join the energy transition at a time when electricity is increasingly becoming the backbone of a sustainable society. ## How you'll make an impact - Collaborate with the project core team to develop protection and control concepts for (sub-)transmission systems, working closely with customers during the base design phase - Contribute to and coordinate the Protection & Control detailed engineering scope, working in close alignment with other engineering disciplines such as SCADA and Network & Cyber Security - Support the design and/or configuration of protection and control IEDs for (sub-)transmission substations, ensuring solutions meet customer specifications - Participate in and help lead factory testing activities at our test facilities in Baden (Switzerland), including Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT) carried out in partnership with customers ## Your background - Bachelor's degree in electrical engineering or equivalent (e.g. Technikerschule), with relevant experience in substation automation systems - Knowledge of substation control and protection systems, including communication standards such as IEC 61850 - Experience with Hitachi Energy's protection and control IED portfolio (Relion® family) is an advantage - Open-minded team player with a strong focus on customer satisfaction, safety, quality, and efficiency - Ability to work independently while effectively coordinating with multiple stakeholders in a project environment - Strong communication skills and the confidence to take technical decisions - Fluent in English, both written and spoken, German language is an advantage ## More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Die Gelegenheit Um unser Team zu stärken, suchen wir einen Projektingenieur – Grid Automation Control & Protection, um die erfolgreiche Lieferung von Netzautomatisierungsprojekten in ganz Europa zu unterstützen. In dieser Rolle werden Sie eng mit dem Projektmanagement, den Ingenieurteams und den Kunden zusammenarbeiten, um die Steuerung und den Schutz von komplexen Umspannwerksautomatisierungsprojekten zu gewährleisten. Sie werden Teil einer Weltklasse-Engineering-Community in unserem European Hub sein und gemeinsam mit erfahrenen Kollegen mit tiefem Know-how bei der Umsetzung großer und technisch anspruchsvoller Projekte weltweit zusammenarbeiten. Diese Position bietet ein hervorragendes Umfeld, um ein nachhaltiges, flexibles und sicheres Energiesystem zu entwickeln, zu wachsen und einen sinnvollen Beitrag zu Hitachi Energy zu leisten. Es ist eine einzigartige Gelegenheit, der Energiewende zu einer Zeit beizutreten, in der Strom zunehmend zum Rückgrat einer nachhaltigen Gesellschaft wird. Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben - Zusammenarbeit mit dem Projekt-Kernteam zur Entwicklung von Schutz- und Steuerungskonzepten für (Sub-)Transmissionssysteme, die eng mit Kunden in der Basisplanungsphase zusammenarbeiten - Um den detaillierten Engineering-Bereich von Protection & Control zu koordinieren und zu koordinieren, in enger Abstimmung mit anderen Ingenieurdisziplinen wie SCADA und Network & Cyber Security - Unterstützung der Konstruktion und/oder Konfiguration von Schutz- und Steuerungs-IEDs für (Unter-)Transmissions-Unterstationen, um sicherzustellen, dass Lösungen Kundenspezifikationen erfüllen - Nehmen Sie an und helfen Sie bei unseren Testanlagen in Baden (Schweiz), einschließlich Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT), die in Zusammenarbeit mit Kunden durchgeführt werden Ihr Hintergrund - Bachelor-Abschluss in Elektrotechnik oder Äquivalent (z.B. Technikerschule), mit relevanten Erfahrungen in Umspannautomationssystemen - Kenntnisse der Unterstations- und Schutzsysteme, einschließlich Kommunikationsstandards wie IEC 61850 - Erfahrung mit dem Schutz- und Kontrollportfolio von Hitachi Energy (Relion® Familie) ist ein Vorteil - Offener Teamplayer mit einem starken Fokus auf Kundenzufriedenheit, Sicherheit, Qualität und Effizienz - Fähigkeit, unabhängig zu arbeiten und effektiv mit mehreren Stakeholdern in einem Projektumfeld zu koordinieren - Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und das Vertrauen in technische Entscheidungen - fließend in Englisch, geschrieben und gesprochen, deutsche Sprache ist ein Vorteil Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'opportunité Pour renforcer notre équipe, nous sommes à la recherche d'un ingénieur de projet – Grid Automation Control & Protection pour soutenir la livraison réussie de projets d'automatisation de réseau dans toute l'Europe. Dans ce rôle, vous collaborerez étroitement avec la gestion de projet, d'autres équipes d'ingénierie et des clients afin de fournir le contrôle et la protection des projets complexes d'automatisation des sous-stations. Vous ferez partie d'une communauté d'ingénieurs de calibre mondial au sein de notre European Hub, en collaboration avec des collègues expérimentés possédant une expertise approfondie dans l'exécution de grands projets techniquement exigeants dans le monde entier. Cette position offre un excellent environnement pour apprendre, grandir et apporter une contribution significative à l'objectif d'Hitachi Energy de faire progresser un système énergétique durable, flexible et sûr. C'est une occasion unique de rejoindre la transition énergétique à un moment où l'électricité devient de plus en plus l'épine dorsale d'une société durable. Comment vous ferez un impact - Collaborer avec l'équipe centrale du projet pour développer des concepts de protection et de contrôle pour les systèmes de (sous-)transmission, en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec les clients pendant la phase de conception de base - Contribuer à la protection et au contrôle et coordonner la portée technique détaillée, en travaillant en alignement étroit avec d'autres disciplines d'ingénierie telles que SCADA et Network & Cyber Security - Soutenir la conception et/ou la configuration des dispositifs de protection et de contrôle des sous-stations de transport, en veillant à ce que les solutions répondent aux spécifications du client - Participer et aider à des activités de test en usine dans nos installations d'essais à Baden (Suisse), y compris les tests d'acceptation en usine (FAT) réalisés en partenariat avec des clients Vos antécédents - Baccalauréat en génie électrique ou équivalent (par exemple Technikerschule), avec une expérience pertinente dans les systèmes d'automatisation des sous-stations - Connaissance des systèmes de contrôle et de protection des sous-stations, y compris les normes de communication telles que la CEI 61850 - Expérience de la protection et du contrôle du portefeuille IED d'Hitachi Energy (famille Rélion®) est un avantage - Joueur d'équipe ouvert d'esprit avec un accent fort sur la satisfaction des clients, la sécurité, la qualité et l'efficacité - Capacité de travailler de façon indépendante tout en coordonnant efficacement avec plusieurs intervenants dans un environnement de projet - Fortes compétences en communication et confiance dans la prise de décisions techniques - La langue allemande est un avantage Plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et croître.

jobs.title: Prozess- und Anlagentechniker/in 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position  Für unsere Industrie 4.0-fähige Produktion von Leistungshalbleitern suchen wir eine engagierte und technisch versierte Persönlichkeit als Process & Equipment Technician.  Mit deinem Know-how in Systemtechnik und Automatisierung sorgst du für eine hohe Anlagenverfügbarkeit, behebst Störungen, treibst Verbesserungen voran und unterstützt deine Kolleg\/innen bei technischen Fragestellungen. Gemeinsam mit dem Engineering-Team bringst du unsere Fertigung auf das nächste Level und begleitest die Integration neuer Anlagen in laufende Produktionsprozesse.  Das kannst du bewirken  Kalibrierung, Wartung und Instandhaltung von Anlagen und Komponenten  Eigenständige Fehlersuche und -behebung an komplexen Produktionssystemen (2.\/3. Level)  Präventive und zustandsabhängige Instandhaltung, um Stillstände zu minimieren  Dokumentation und Kommunikation des Anlagenzustands und technischer Anpassungen  Überwachung der Prozesskonformität und Qualitätskontrolle (SPC)  Umsetzung von Verbesserungsmassnahmen in Zusammenarbeit mit Engineering und Support  Schulung und Unterstützung von Kolleg\/innen bei technischen Themen  Sicherstellung der Arbeitssicherheit in allen Tätigkeiten  Das bringst du mit  Abgeschlossene Ausbildung EFZ als Automatiker\/in, Elektroniker\/in oder Polymechaniker\/in  Fundierte elektrotechnische Grundausbildung, idealerweise mit Weiterbildung als Systemtechniker\/in  Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Instandhaltung oder Automatisierung von Produktionsanlagen  Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Steuerungstechnik, Pneumatik und\/oder Roboterprogrammierung  Strukturierte, analytische und selbstständige Arbeitsweise   Gute Deutschkenntnisse (C1) und Englischkenntnisse (B2)  Mehr über uns  Sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen  Ein kollegiales Team mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen  Attraktive Anstellungsbedingungen und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Sulla posizione Per la nostra produzione industriale 4.0-capable di semiconduttori di potenza siamo alla ricerca di una personalità dedicata e tecnicamente versata come un Process & Equipment Technician. Con il tuo know-how nella tecnologia del sistema e nell'automazione, guidi ad alta disponibilità di impianti, risoluzione dei problemi, miglioramento dell'azionamento e supporto ai tuoi colleghi in problemi tecnici. Insieme al team di ingegneri, portate la nostra produzione al livello successivo e accompagnate l'integrazione di nuovi impianti nei processi produttivi in corso. Questo può essere fatto calibrando, mantenendo e mantenendo impianti e componenti di risoluzione dei problemi indipendenti e risoluzione dei problemi di complessi sistemi di produzione (2 ° terzo livello) manutenzione preventiva e condizionale per minimizzare la documentazione di standstill e la comunicazione delle condizioni degli impianti e degli adattamenti tecnici Monitoraggio della conformità del processo e del controllo della qualità (SPC) Attuazione delle misure di miglioramento in collaborazione con l'ingegneria e il supporto Formazione e supporto dei colleghi in materia tecnica
• Requisiti - Allenamento completo EFZ come automatico, elettronico o polimeccanico - Fondata formazione elettrotecnica di base, ideale con ulteriore formazione come tecnico di sistema - Esperienza pluriennale nella manutenzione o nell'automazione degli impianti di produzione - Ottima conoscenza della tecnologia di controllo, della programmazione pneumatica e/o robot - Funzionamento strutturato, analitico e indipendente - Buona conoscenza del tedesco (C1) e dell'inglese (B2) Cosa? - Posto di lavoro sicuro in una società orientata al futuro - Una squadra collegiale con un breve processo decisionale - Condizioni di lavoro interessanti e possibilità di sviluppo Contatto - Altro su di noi
descriptionByLocale.en:
Descrizione About the position For our Industry 4.0-capable production of power semiconductors we are looking for a dedicated and technically versed personality as a Process & Equipment Technician. With your know-how in system technology and automation, you drive for high plant availability, troubleshooting, drive improvements and support your colleagues in technical issues. Together with the engineering team, you bring our production to the next level and accompany the integration of new plants into ongoing production processes. This can be done by calibrating, maintaining and maintaining plants and components independent troubleshooting and troubleshooting of complex production systems (2nd/3rd level) preventive and conditional maintenance to minimize standstill documentation and communication of plant condition and technical adjustments Monitoring process compliance and quality control (SPC) Implementation of improvement measures in cooperation with engineering and support Training and support of colleagues in technical matters Ensuring work safety in all
• Requisiti - Completed training EFZ as an automatic, electronic or polymechanical - Found basic electrotechnical training, ideally with further training as a system technician - Multiannual experience in the maintenance or automation of production plants - Very good knowledge of control technology, pneumatics and/or robot programming - Structured, analytical and independent operation - Good knowledge of German (C1) and English (B2)
• Cosa offriamo - Secure workplace in a future-oriented company - A collegial team with short decision-making - Attractive employment conditions and development possibilities Contatto - More about us
