Champion innovation and market‑back insights , feeding customer, competitor, and market intelligence into the organization to shape future product strategies, guide investment decisions, and identify new growth oppor
descriptionByLocale.en: The opportunity Our Grid Integration – GPQSS (AC system integration business) is seeking a global Marketing and Sales Leader to shape, accelerate, and execute our worldwide commercial strategy. This senior strategic role requires an accomplished sales executive capable of driving profitable growth, strengthening our market presence, and leading high‑performing global teams within a complex matrix organization. As the Executive Sales & Marketing Manager, you will own the long‑term commercial strategy and its operational execution for the Global Product Group, setting the global sales vision and targets while ensuring effective deployment across countries and segments. You will be responsible for delivering ambitious growth, margin, and market‑expansion objectives in alignment with the Business Unit's Marketing & Sales strategy. As a key member of the global leadership team, you will collaborate closely with Product Management, Business Development, Operations, Finance, and regional leaders, and you will represent Hitachi Energy's Grid and Power Quality Solutions and Service business in senior customer engagements, industry forums, and strategic partnerships, positioning the organization as a trusted technology leader. How you'll make an impact Lead the development and execution of the global commercial strategy for the GPQSS business , establishing a clear long‑term vision while translating it into actionable, country‑level and segment‑specific sales plans that enable consistent, scalable growth worldwide. Define and own the global sales ambition , including revenue, margin, and market‑expansion targets, ensuring that sales objectives are not only aligned with the Business Unit's Marketing & Sales strategy but also underpinned by data‑driven insights, competitive positioning, and emerging customer trends. Drive profitable growth across all regions by orchestrating a unified go‑to‑market approach, strengthening pipeline quality, enhancing forecasting precision, and ensuring disciplined commercial performance management across a complex matrix structure. Elevate the global market presence of Hitachi Energy's Grid and Power Quality Solutions & Services , positioning the portfolio as the industry benchmark through targeted market intelligence, differentiated value propositions, and thought‑leadership activities that reinforce our reputation as a trusted technology leader. Lead, inspire, and develop high‑performing global sales and marketing teams , embedding a culture of accountability, collaboration, and commercial excellence while equipping teams with the tools, training, and structures they need to execute at scale. Act as a strategic partner to key internal stakeholders , including Product Management, Business Development, Operations, Finance, and regional leadership, ensuring tight alignment between commercial strategy, product roadmap priorities, delivery capabilities, and business performance objectives. Represent the business at the highest levels in customer and industry engagements , building and nurturing executive relationships, leading negotiations, and influencing industry bodies, strategic alliances, and ecosystem partners to advance Hitachi Energy's leadership in grid integration and power quality. Drive cross‑functional alignment to accelerate market penetration , ensuring seamless coordination between sales, marketing, tendering, service, and operations to maximize win rates, optimize pricing strategies, and enhance customer value across the lifecycle. Oversee commercial governance frameworks and performance metrics , ensuring that global sales activities are executed consistently, ethically, and efficiently, and that rigorous performance tracking supports continuous improvement and strategic agility. jobs.title: Field Service Technician Power Transformers (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity   Join our dynamic Transformers After Sales team in Zürich, Switzerland, and play a hands-on role in powering the nation! As a key player, you'll be at the forefront of maintaining and enhancing the reliability and longevity of power transformers all across Switzerland. In this role, you'll directly impact the stability of the Swiss electrical grid and get the unique opportunity to work alongside leading companies in the Swiss energy sector.  Every day, you'll tackle new technical challenges, ensure the safe and high-quality execution of critical fieldwork, and proudly represent Hitachi Energy's reputation for technical excellence and customer satisfaction. Step into a position where your expertise truly makes a difference!    How you´ll make an impact Apply and enforce Hitachi Energy safety standards during all onsite operations.  Perform installations, preventive and corrective maintenance, inspections, and overhauls on power transformers in accordance with internal procedures.  Plan, coordinate and optimize field interventions to ensure efficiency and quality.  Identify potential service opportunities and communicate them to the Sales team.  Collaborate closely with customers, project teams, suppliers and other stakeholders, ensuring clear and timely communication.  Actively contribute to continuous improvement within the service organization.  Complete all reports, documentation and quality records accurately in the internal tracking system.    Your background   Federal Certificate of Competence (CFC) in mechanics, industrial maintenance, electromechanics, or a related field (e.g., locksmith, mechanic, polymechanic, automation technician).  At least 2 years of relevant field experience is considered an asset.  Willingness to travel across Switzerland for extended periods (minimum 1 week) and occasionally work in 2×8 shifts.  Strong sense of responsibility and high awareness of safety requirements.  Valid Category B driver's licence.  Good command of German, with English and French as additional working languages.    What would be a plus   Knowledge of electrical wiring and electrical diagrams  Welding skills  Motivation to follow internal training on transformer assembly and field interventions, including advanced training in Hitachi Energy factories  More about us Exciting and varied responsibilities with plenty of room for autonomy and creativity Attractive opportunities for further training and personal development Interesting and diverse tasks and projects – including international assignments A well ‑ coordinated and dynamic team An open and supportive company culture An attractive compensation package including fixed salary, travel and meal allowances, as well as the opportunity to have a say in accommodation arrangements

jobs.title: R&D Transformer Service Operations domain expert (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity: For our Transformer Global Team we are looking for R&D Transformer Service Operations domain expert (f\/m\/d) In this role you will be responsible for supporting and leading Research and Development projects related to Transformer Service Operations. Your focus will be contribution towards operations around transformer service portfolio, best practices collection, standardization and coordination of improvements within Transformer Service HUBs and local units together with Technology Centers and Research teams. How will you make an impact: Run standardization projects, propose and develop new operational concepts around new services, and simulate their expected performance in real pilots. Organize prototyping and testing activities to validate new \/ existing transformer services. Making standard policies, instructions, training material to ensure the effective implementation of the targeted processes from operational, quality and knowledge transfer standpoint. Provide support to other team member as well as local units when needed (operations, engineering, product management, product marketing, ...) Participate in, and assist team members in a variety of more complex operations activities. Global collaboration with scientists of Hitachi Energy Research team and Technology Centers, Technology Managers and Engineers from the various GPGs (Service \/ PT \/ DT). Your background: MSc education within Electrical or Mechanical Engineering field. More than 10 years of proven experience within Power Transformers operations. Experience in transformer service portfolio within multinational environment will be highly valued. Ability to use effective methodologies around knowledge and experience capture. Ability to create technical and operational documentation, training instructions… Spirit of innovation, out of the box thinking. Excellent abilities in teamwork in international teams with excellent interpersonal skills. A high level of self-motivation. A collaborative, structured, problem-solving, self-driven, solutions-oriented approach and strong communication skills. Fluent spoken and written English. Other languages will be an advantage. More about us: Our employee benefit programs are tailored to each country, depending on  location of employment and job grade. More specific information on the employee benefit program offering in your intended country of employment\/ more information will be available during the recruitment process.

jobs.title: ​​Lead Data Platform Architect​
jobs.description: The Opportunity   Business Unit Service is at the forefront of delivering advanced digital and outcome ‑ based service solutions worldwide. Our Service R&D organization develops next ‑ generation digital, data ‑ driven, and OT ‑ integrated service solutions that enable long ‑ term asset performance, reliability, and operational excellence across the energy and industrial domain.   As   Lead   Data Platform Architect, you will play a key role in defining and evolving the data platform foundation that underpins BU Service digital service solutions. You will ensure that data platforms spanning cloud services, IoT and OT data sources, analytics, and AI enablement are architected, governed, and   operated   to support scalable, secure, and high ‑ quality digital solutions.   This role directly   impacts   the success of data ‑ driven services, advanced analytics, and AI ‑ powered use cases, where data quality, availability, and reliability are critical for business value and customer trust.   How   You'll   Make an Impact   Defining and owning the data platform strategy and architecture for digital service solutions, covering   cloud ‑ native   data platforms, data lakes\/ lakehouses , streaming and batch pipelines, and analytics services.   Establishing architectural principles and standards aligned with modern cloud delivery models, industrial scalability, and long ‑ lifecycle service solutions.   Governing data ingestion and integration patterns from cloud services, enterprise systems, IoT, OT devices, and edge software.   Designing and   maintaining   data models, schemas, and integration patterns that ensure consistent, reusable, and high ‑ quality data across solutions.   Establishing and operating data governance frameworks, including data quality, lineage, traceability, ownership, and lifecycle management.   Ensuring compliance with cybersecurity, regulatory, and industrial data handling requirements.   Enabling advanced analytics, AI\/ML, and digital twin use cases through   appropriate data   platform capabilities, pipelines, and analytics services.   Guiding implementation of robust, scalable data pipelines and storage solutions in collaboration with development, platform, DevOps, AI, cybersecurity, and IT teams.   Integrating data platform components into CI\/CD pipelines, supporting automated testing, deployment, and governance controls.   Defining and monitoring key metrics related to data quality, platform reliability, usage, and business impact.   Your Background   University degree descriptionByLocale.it: The Opportunity   Business Unit Service is at the forefront of delivering advanced digital and outcome ‑ based service solutions worldwide. Our Service R&D organization develops next ‑ generation digital, data ‑ driven, and OT ‑ integrated service solutions that enable long ‑ term asset performance, reliability, and operational excellence across the energy and industrial domain.   As   Lead   Data Platform Architect, you will play a key role in defining and evolving the data platform foundation that underpins BU Service digital service solutions. You will ensure that data platforms spanning cloud services, IoT and OT data sources, analytics, and AI enablement are architected, governed, and   operated   to support scalable, secure, and high ‑ quality digital solutions.   This role directly   impacts   the success of data ‑ driven services, advanced analytics, and AI ‑ powered use cases, where data quality, availability, and reliability are critical for business value and customer trust.   How   You'll   Make an Impact   Defining and owning the data platform strategy and architecture for digital service solutions, covering   cloud ‑ native   data platforms, data lakes\/ lakehouses , streaming and batch pipelines, and analytics services.   Establishing architectural principles and standards aligned with modern cloud delivery models, industrial scalability, and long ‑ lifecycle service solutions.   Governing data ingestion and integration patterns from cloud services, enterprise systems, IoT, OT devices, and edge software.   Designing and   maintaining   data models, schemas, and integration patterns that ensure consistent, reusable, and high ‑ quality data across solutions.   Establishing and operating data governance frameworks, including data quality, lineage, traceability, ownership, and lifecycle management.   Ensuring compliance with cybersecurity, regulatory, and industrial data handling requirements. jobs.title: Warehouse Specialist 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position Du möchtest in einem dynamischen Umfeld arbeiten, Verantwortung übernehmen und aktiv zum reibungslosen Materialfluss beitragen? Dann bist du bei uns genau richtig. Als Warehouse Specialist spielst du eine entscheidende Rolle in unserem Logistikbereich und sorgst dafür, dass Material und Waren termingerecht, sicher und korrekt bewegt, gelagert und bereitgestellt werden. Mit deinem Engagement trägst du dazu bei, Ordnung, Effizienz und Qualität in unseren Lagerprozessen sicherzustellen. Das kannst du bewirken Administrative Tätigkeiten Erfassen und Pflegen von Daten im ERP-System Erstellen von Lieferscheinen, Versandpapieren und internen Dokumenten Bearbeitung von Bestellungen und Rückmeldungen Telefonische und schriftliche Korrespondenz mit internen Stellen und Lieferanten Unterstützung der Logistikleitung bei Auswertungen und Reportings Logistik & Lager Aktive Mitarbeit bei Prozessoptimierung und kontinuierlicher Verbesserung (KVP) Einlagerung der Ware nach vorgegebenen Prozessen Kommissionieren, Verpacken und Versandvorbereitung Be- und Entladen von LKW Durchführung von Inventuren Ordnung und Sauberkeit im Lager sicherstellen Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Logistiker\/in EFZ oder mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Logistik Erfahrung mit administrativen Tätigkeiten von Vorteil Gute PC-Kenntnisse (MS Office, ERP-Systeme SAP \/S4 HANA) Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, Englischkenntnisse von Vorteil Selbstständige, strukturierte und zuverlässige Arbeitsweise Körperlich belastbar und teamfähig Staplerausweis Mehr über uns Sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen Ein kollegiales Team mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen Attraktive Anstellungsbedingungen und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten

jobs.title: Vorarbeiter/in Montage 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position Als Vorarbeiter in der GI Valves Fabrik in Turgi bzw. Seon übernimmst Du eine zentrale Rolle in der täglichen Produktionssteuerung. Du koordinierst operative Tätigkeiten innerhalb des Teams und sorgst dafür, dass Montage-, Prüf- und Logistikprozesse effizient, sicher und qualitätsgerecht ablaufen. Dabei bist Du die direkte Ansprechperson für die Mitarbeiter und arbeitest eng mit der Produktionsleitung und anderen Schnittstellen zusammen. Dein Einsatz trägt wesentlich dazu bei, dass wir unsere Produktionsziele erreichen und uns kontinuierlich verbessern. Neben koordinativen Tätigkeiten arbeitest Du aktiv im Montageprozess mit.   Das kannst du bewirken Organisation und Überwachung der Produktionsabläufe (Montage, Prüfung, Logistik) Unterstützung des Teams sowohl fachlich als auch operativ Einhaltung von Sicherheits-, Qualitäts- und Umweltvorgaben Unterstützung bei der Einarbeitung neuer Mitarbeitender und Durchführung von Sicherheitsunterweisungen Zusammenarbeit mit Schnittstellen wie Planung, Qualität und Logistik sowie Dokumentation der Produktionsleistung   Das bringst du mit Technische Berufsausbildung (z.   B. Elektrotechnik, Elektroinstallation, Mechatronik) Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Montage elektrotechnischer Komponenten Erfahrung als Vorarbeiter und gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten Deutsch in Wort und Schrift, Englischkenntnisse von Vorteil SAP-Kenntnisse und Erfahrung mit digitalen Produktionssystemen sind ein Plus   Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

jobs.title: Product Engineer – Power Semiconductors Packaging (BiMOS) 80 – 100% (m/f/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a Product Engineer, you will be a core member of the BiMOS Product Engineering Team, playing a key role at the interface of manufacturing, R&D, and quality. Based in Lenzburg, Switzerland, you will take end-to-end ownership of a product platform and drive its optimization using advanced data analysis and continuous improvement methods. Your work will directly impact product quality, yield, and cost competitiveness in high power semiconductor manufacturing. How you will make an impact Monitor, analyze, and interpret yield and quality data to identify improvement opportunities and drive sustainable enhancements in cost, quality, and yield Lead and execute improvement projects using methodologies such as Six Sigma, Lean Manufacturing, 8D, and related frameworks Take full product ownership after R&D handover, including coordination and monitoring of new product ramp up in the fabrication line Perform root cause analysis and troubleshooting of product defects, weaknesses, and quality issues, deriving clear conclusions on process and design gaps Maintain, enhance, and implement data acquisition, analytics, and reporting methods to support data driven decision making Support process and R&D engineers with strong technical expertise and structured problem-solving approaches Your background Master's degree or PhD in Physics, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline Strong expertise in statistical analysis, problem solving methodologies, and advanced data analysis techniques Semiconductor manufacturing experience is an advantage Proven experience leading complex improvement projects, ideally with small, cross functional teams Comfortable working in an international, matrix organization, with excellent communication and collaboration skills Innovative, quality driven team player with a high willingness to learn and take ownership Very good command of German and English (written and spoken, B2\/C1 level) More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: High Voltage Testing and Process Engineer for Bushings 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity We are looking for a skilled and driven  R&D Test and Process Engineer for Bushings  with a specialized focus on  high voltage (HV) testing and manufacturing process development . This role is critical in ensuring the performance, safety, and compliance of high voltage energy systems through rigorous testing, data analysis, and continuous process optimization. You will play a key role in bridging R&D and manufacturing, supporting the development of innovative energy technologies. How you'll make an impact Lead and execute high voltage testing activities in compliance with IEC, IEEE, and internal standards Design and implement test setups, selecting appropriate HV equipment and methodologies Analyze test data, document results, and support root cause investigations and corrective actions Collaborate with R&D and manufacturing teams to define test strategies and process requirements Drive continuous improvement in testing and prototyping processes to enhance efficiency and quality Ensure proper maintenance, calibration, and safe operation of HV test equipment Support prototyping activities and assess process feasibility in a manufacturing environment Promote a strong safety culture and ensure adherence to ISO 9001, ISO 45001, and company policies Your background Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in high voltage testing. Process engineering experience is a plus. Strong knowledge of HV testing protocols, equipment, and safety practices Familiarity with IEC, IEEE, ISO 9001, and ISO 45001 standards Proficient in analyzing test data and conducting failure analyses Fluent in German and good English knowledge, with excellent communication and problem-solving skills About Us Hitachi Energy offers you interesting tasks in a highly motivated team and an open communication style. Through an individual and practice-oriented induction plan, we will support you to quickly gain professional confidence to be able to work independently with high level of personal responsibility.

jobs.title: Commissioning Engineer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description:
The opportunity Hitachi Energy High Voltage Service supports customers worldwide with after-sales services for generator circuit breakers and gas-insulated switchgear (GIS). The team works closely with customers globally on installation, commissioning, maintenance, retrofitting and modernization. In this role, you will be closely involved with the product and work on construction sites around the world. You will take on responsibility, contribute your own ideas and gain valuable international experience through extended assignments abroad. Continuous learning, teamwork and professional development are an integral part of your daily work. How you'll make an impact Commission and test GIS systems in close cooperation with customer representatives Verify correct system functionality according to specifications and scope of supply Identify deviations and initiate corrective actions with project stakeholders Ensure compliance with site safety regulations and procedures at all times Apply and monitor environmental protection measures on site Participate in site meetings with relevant stakeholders Your background Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechanics, or a related field Initial experience in commissioning and\/or control system engineering Fluent German and English communication skills Ability to work independently under challenging site conditions Willingness to travel globally up to 90% of working time More about us We are a technology-driven company with a strong focus on innovation, continuous improvement, and sustainable manufacturing. 
• We offer flexible working conditions, dedicated mentorship, and a supportive, inclusive environment where you can grow personally and professionally – empowering you to thrive while balancing life and work.

jobs.title: Quality Specialist 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a Quality Specialist in Production, you are responsible for ensuring product and process quality, as well as continuously improving our manufacturing operations. You will collaborate closely with Engineering, Production, and Supply Chain to ensure compliance with internal and external quality requirements. How you'll make an impact Create and maintain quality and inspection plans Support new products and production lines, including quality and reliability assessments Participate in PFMEA, DFMEA, and process development activities Monitor critical process parameters and ensure compliance with quality standards Lead NCR management and analyze deviations using methods such as Pareto, 8D, Ishikawa, or 5‑Why Maintain quality‑relevant documentation and support internal\/external audits (incl. customer and ISO) Support the digitalization and automation of the production lines Collaborate with Production, Engineering, Supply Chain, CI, and lead or support quality-related projects and outgoing inspections Your background Technical education or university degree in Quality Management, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science, Production Technology, or a similar field Several years of experience in a production environment, ideally in quality assurance and preferably in a ceramic or silicon molding industry Strong knowledge of quality methods (8D, FMEA, RCA, Control Plans) Experience in auditing and in preparing quality reports Excellent analytical skills and a structured way of working Strong communication skills and a collaborative, solution‑oriented mindset Fluent in German and English, written and spoken Ability to work effectively with cross‑functional teams and stakeholders More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Process Engineer BiMOS Backend 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a global leader in power semiconductor technology, we offer one of the most diverse product portfolios in the industry. Our products include thyristors, diodes, gate turn-off thyristors, integrated gate-commutated thyristors, insulated-gate bipolar transistors, and metal–oxide–semiconductor field-effect transistors. These components are trusted across sectors such as power transmission and distribution, mobility, and renewable energy for their exceptional quality and reliability. In the role of Process Engineer for BiMOS Backend, you will contribute to the advancement of our automated semiconductor production. You'll have the opportunity to improve existing manufacturing processes and lead innovative development projects, with a particular focus on automation and metal joining technologies. How you'll make an impact Improve the capability and quality of bonding and welding processes, by applying data analysis tools and designed experiments Analyze production data to optimize performance, identify long-term trends, and prevent potential failures Work on new automated production systems, improving production capacity and quality Support troubleshooting and root cause analysis to maintain and improve production throughput Collaborate to new product development by shaping the production process landscape and enabling volume manufacturing   Your background A master's degree in industrial, mechanical, electrical, or chemical engineering, or a related field Several years of experience in an automated production environment, ideally within the semiconductor industry Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, a quality-focused mindset, and a proactive, hands-on approach Familiarity with DoE, data analysis, Six Sigma methodologies, and production statistics is a plus Proficiency in both German and English More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Mechaniker 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Postion In dieser vielseitigen Position als Mechaniker tragen Sie maßgeblich zur Sicherstellung eines reibungslosen Produktionsbetriebs bei. Sie übernehmen anspruchsvolle Instandhaltungs- und Reparaturarbeiten an modernen Maschinen und Anlagen und wirken aktiv an technischen Optimierungen sowie Projekten mit. Ihre Fachkenntnisse in Mechanik, Automation und Steuerungstechnik ermöglichen es Ihnen, Störungen effizient zu analysieren und nachhaltige Lösungen umzusetzen. Dabei arbeiten Sie eng mit verschiedenen Schnittstellen zusammen und leisten einen wichtigen Beitrag zur kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung unserer technischen Infrastruktur. Unsere lokale Produktgruppe Insulation & Components ist technischer Marktführer in der Auslegung und Herstellung von Transformatoren-Durchführungen. Zu den Kunden zählen namhafte, internationale Unternehmen der Elektroindustrie, die sich mit Stromerzeugung, Stromübertragung und Stromverteilung befassen. Unsere Hochspannungs-Durchführungen nehmen weltweit eine Spitzenposition ein. Das können Sie bewirken Mechanische Instandsetzungsarbeiten an Maschinen und Anlagen durchführen Wartungs- und Revisionsarbeiten an Maschinen und Anlagen vornehmen Störungssuche- und analyse, sowie Behebung an Produktionsanlage Anpassungen und Umbauten an Produktions- und Infrastrukturanlagen Mitarbeit bei grossen Projekten in Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Schnittstellen Erstellen von Wartungsunterlagen und Pflege Ersatzteilmanagement Das bringen Sie mit Grundausbildung als Mechaniker im Bereich Mechatronik, Maschinen- und Anlagenbau oder Werkzeugbau Berufserfahrung in der Instandhaltung \/ Instandsetzung von Maschinen und Anlagen Kenntnisse im Bereich Automation \/ Steuerungstechnik \/ Antriebstechnik Deutsch (gute Kenntnisse) Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmodelle helfen Ihnen, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren und gleichzeitig ein Umfeld zu schaffen, in dem alle Mitarbeitenden befähigt sind und sich entfalten können.

jobs.title: Produktionsmitarbeiter/in 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Die Möglichkeit Werde Teil eines engagierten Teams und übernimm Verantwortung beim Einrichten und Bedienen eines vielseitigen und anspruchsvollen Maschinenparks. Du sorgst für reibungslose Abläufe in der Fertigung, steuerst Aufträge eigenständig, führst Qualitätsprüfungen durch und stellst die Einsatzbereitschaft der Maschinen sicher. Mit technischem Know-how, Eigeninitiative und Teamgeist trägst Du aktiv zur Effizienz und Weiterentwicklung unserer Produktionsprozesse bei. Unsere Fabrik in Klingnau steht unseren Kunden als Kompetenzzentrum für die hochpräzise Kunststoffverarbeitung auf Weltniveau zur Verfügung. Der Standort lebt von einem flexiblen und motivierten Team mit einer flachen Hierarchie und kurzen Entscheidungswegen. Durch den stetigen Ausbau unserer Kompetenzen im Bereich der Kunststoffverarbeitung als auch durch die ständige Verbesserung unserer Geschäftsprozesse offerieren wir unseren Kunden innovative, zuverlässige, individuelle und sichere Lösungen für Ihre Anliegen in den Segmenten Stromerzeugung\/-verteilung, Railway, Raumfahrt, Service und Industrie. Diesen stellen wir Ihnen zu angemessenen Preisen, termingerecht in der gewünschten Qualität zur Verfügung. Wir sichern unsere Wettbewerbsfähigkeit durch Automatisierung und Optimierung unserer Fertigungslinien, um damit noch schneller und flexibler auf weltweite Markt und Kundenanforderungen eingehen zu können. Das kannst Du bewirken Maschinenbedienung: Selbstständiges Einrichten und Bedienen eines komplexen konventionellen Maschinenparks (u. a. Mehrspindelportalfräsmaschinen, Zylinderschleifmaschinen, Mehrblattsägen, Fräs- sowie Kehlmaschinen) Prüfanlagen & Zuschnitt: Eigenständiges Einrichten und Bedienen elektrischer Prüfanlagen sowie verschiedener Besäumanlagen Steuerung von Aufträgen: Du koordinierst und steuerst Fertigungsaufträge eigenverantwortlich und stellst eine termingerechte Abarbeitung sicher Qualitätsprüfung: Du führst regelmäßige Qualitätsprüfungen an bearbeiteten Bauteilen durch – von Einzelteilen bis hin zu Kleinserien Wartung und Instandhaltung: Du übernimmst die Wartung und den Unterhalt der eingesetzten Maschinen und sorgst für deren zuverlässige Einsatzbereitschaft Überwachung von Hilfsmitteln: Du behältst den Einsatz von Fertigungshilfsmitteln im Blick und stellst deren Verfügbarkeit und Funktionalität sicher Transport & Logistik: Du bedienst verschiedene Flurförderfahrzeuge und unterstützt so einen reibungslosen Materialfluss in der Produktion Das bringst Du mit Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Polymechaniker, Industriemechaniker, Formenbauer, Schreiner oder in einem ähnlichen Beruf mit mehrjähriger Erfahrung in einer vergleichbaren Position Gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, Englischkenntnisse von Vorteil Du bist teamfähig, arbeitest selbstständig und bringst ein hohes Maß an Verantwortungsbewusstsein mit Du besitzt ein ausgezeichnetes Verständnis für technische Zeichnungen und Stücklisten Du bist flexibel, zeigst Eigeninitiative und bringst eine hohe Leistungsbereitschaft mit Unternehmerisches Denken und eine ausgeprägte Kundenorientierung zeichnen dich aus Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen Dir, Deine beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

descriptionByLocale.en: Die Möglichkeit Werde Teil eines engagierten Teams und übernimm Verantwortung beim Einrichten und Bedienen eines vielseitigen und anspruchsvollen Maschinenparks. Du sorgst für reibungslose Abläufe in der Fertigung, steuerst Aufträge eigenständig, führst Qualitätsprüfungen durch und stellst die Einsatzbereitschaft der Maschinen sicher. Mit technischem Know-how, Eigeninitiative und Teamgeist trägst Du aktiv zur Effizienz und Weiterentwicklung unserer Produktionsprozesse bei. Unsere Fabrik in Klingnau steht unseren Kunden als Kompetenzzentrum für die hochpräzise Kunststoffverarbeitung auf Weltniveau zur Verfügung. Der Standort lebt von einem flexiblen und motivierten Team mit einer flachen Hierarchie und kurzen Entscheidungswegen. Durch den stetigen Ausbau unserer Kompetenzen im Bereich der Kunststoffverarbeitung als auch durch die ständige Verbesserung unserer Geschäftsprozesse offerieren wir unseren Kunden innovative, zuverlässige, individuelle und sichere Lösungen für Ihre Anliegen in den Segmenten Stromerzeugung\/-verteilung, Railway, Raumfahrt, Service und Industrie. Diesen stellen wir Ihnen zu angemessenen Preisen, termingerecht in der gewünschten Qualität zur Verfügung. Wir sichern unsere Wettbewerbsfähigkeit durch Automatisierung und Optimierung unserer Fertigungslinien, um damit noch schneller und flexibler auf weltweite Markt und Kundenanforderungen eingehen zu können. jobs.title: Field Service Technician 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The Opportunity As a Field Service Technician, you will play a key role in maintaining the reliable operation of traction transformers across customer sites and in our factory. You will perform hands-on repairs, diagnose technical issues, and support customers directly. With your practical expertise, you will collaborate closely with internal teams and contribute to continuous product and process improvements. How you'll make an impact Always follow safety standards and company procedures during both field (60%) and factory (40%) activities. Perform on-site repairs and servicing of traction transformers, delivering prompt and professional solutions. Conduct field repairs, electrical diagnostic testing, and oil treatment at customer locations. Support failure investigations through disassembly, root-cause analysis, and the preparation of technical reports. Provide customers with technical support and training on equipment operation and basic maintenance. Contribute to small improvement projects aimed at boosting quality, efficiency, and service processes. Prepare service documentation, including work reports, material usage, quality inspection cards, and repair records. Collaborate with engineering, quality, project management, and sales teams to resolve escalated technical issues. In the factory, ensure effective coordination and execution of repair work alongside the Service team. Your background Completed technical apprenticeship or degree in Electrical\/Electrotechnical\/Maintenance fields. Minimum of 1–2 years of field service or technical repair experience, ideally in an industrial environment. Ability to read and interpret technical drawings, electrical cabling diagrams, and schematics. Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills for solving complex technical problems. Customer-oriented communicator, fluent in English; French is an advantage. Independent, self-driven, and flexible with working hours. Valid driving licence. More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow

jobs.title: Electrical Engineer – Standards Compliance Expert for Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our team to drive the implementation of the latest internal and external standards in our Dry Transformers across all the factories in HUB Europe. This role offers you an exciting opportunity to broaden your expertise across various disciplines and functions, engage in dynamic projects and build a strong professional network both within and outside our organization. How you'll make an impact Be an active member of International Standards Committees, staying up to date with emerging changes and requirements and influencing standards development Support Product Management in developing and implementing our Global Technology Platform by engaging in requirements definition and supporting the rollout phases Work with teams from various functions, including Engineering, Operations and Quality. You will establish and maintain both internal and external networks to facilitate information exchange Oversee operations across multiple factories and work towards operational harmonization Ensure the effective implementation of both internal and external standards within our Power Transformers Units in Europe by conducting audits, identifying gaps and facilitating their resolution Responsible for communicating updates, deliver training sessions and provide support and technical guidance to colleagues on Standards Compliance related questions Represent our Company in standards-related discussions with customers and industry stakeholders Your background Master's degree in Engineering (Electrical or Mechanical are preferred) About 10 to 15 years of experience in the Power Transformer field Experience in Project Management and managing functional teams Deep knowledge of transformers design, manufacturing, testing and operations Interest in AI tools and their potential integration into one's work L6S green belt is preferred Excellent intercultural sensitivity and ability to develop and maintain healthy working relationships Strong communication skills, fluent in English, both written and spoken More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Senior R&D Reliability Engineer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description:
The opportunity   Business Unit Service is at the forefront of delivering advanced, reliability-driven service solutions worldwide. As we evolve from descriptive monitoring toward scalable predictive and prescriptive intelligence, reliability modelling becomes a cornerstone of how we create customer value across the asset lifecycle.  As Senior Reliability Specialist, you will take an enterprise level role in shaping how reliability intelligence is defined, governed, and applied across our global digital service portfolio. You will operate at the intersection of reliability engineering, digital platforms, and service strategy, ensuring that reliability models are scientifically robust, consistently governed, scalable, and reusable—while being directly connected to operational performance and commercial outcomes.   This is a senior, high impact role for an expert who wants to influence how reliability intelligence is used across an entire organization, not just within a single product or project.    How you'll make an impact    Define and implement the enterprise reliability modelling strategy across BU Service Ensure reliability models deliver consistent, explainable, and decision relevant outputs (e.g., PoF, RUL, risk, mitigation) used in customer facing and decision critical contexts   Coordinate companywide projects and activities to harmonize reliability methods and avoid duplication Govern reliability model development, validation, deployment, and retirement Drive integration of reliability models into digital service and predictive platforms Partner with digital, analytics, and IT\/OT teams on data driven reliability solutions Establish standards, guidelines, and training programs for reliability engineering Define and track KPIs and deliver executive insights on reliability performance and maturity     Your background   Master's or PhD degree in Engineering (Reliability, Systems, Electrical, Mechanical, Industrial, or related) Proven experience in reliability engineering and reliability modelling in mission‑critical environments Strong expertise in failure analysis, reliability modelling, and asset health management methods Experience coordinating or governing technical or modelling activities across multiple teams or units Confidence to work effectively in complex IT\/OT environments with multiple stakeholders Ability to translate reliability insights into operational decisions and service performance outcomes   More about us    
• We offer a highly collaborative environment across engineering, digital, analytics, and service teams A senior, visible role shaping the future of reliability intelligence in global digital services Continuous learning through exposure to leading reliability, predictive, and digital service practices Flexible working practices that help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow

jobs.title: CNC Dreher/in 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description:
Über die Position Unsere lokale Produktgruppe Insulation & Components ist technischer Marktführer in der Auslegung und Herstellung von Transformatoren-Durchführungen. Zu den Kunden zählen namhafte, internationale Unternehmen der Elektroindustrie, die sich mit Stromerzeugung, Stromübertragung und Stromverteilung befassen. Unsere Hochspannungs-Durchführungen nehmen weltweit eine Spitzenposition ein.    Das kannst Du bewirken Einrichtung und Bedienung von CNC- und konventionellen Drehmaschinen Erstellen der CNC Programme zu den Dreharbeiten Fertigen von Einzelteilen und Kleinserien Pflege und Wartung (VBI) der Maschinen und Anlagen Diverse 
• Aufgaben wie Qualitätsvorgaben einhalten, kontinuierlicher Verbesserungsprozess, konsequente Einhaltung der Arbeitssicherheit   Dein Hintergrund Abgeschlossene technische Lehre als Polymechaniker\/in EFZ (oder auch Mechaniker\/in, Maschinenmechaniker\/in) Fundierte Berufserfahrung im Bereich CNC-Drehen, konv. von Vorteil Fliessende Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift Exakte, ordentliche Arbeitsweise Bereitschaft zum Einsatz im 3 Schicht-Betrieb und flexibler Arbeitszeit Mehr über uns Hitachi Energy steht für innovative Technologien und nachhaltige Energielösungen weltweit. Bei uns erwartet dich ein sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen, spannende Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, ein kollegiales und wertschätzendes Arbeitsumfeld sowie attraktive Sozialleistungen.

jobs.title: Power System Analysis and Solution Algorithms Engineer
jobs.description: Job Description The opportunity We are looking for a passionate and proficient industrial specialist with expertise in power system analysis\/ management and high-level programming. In an inter-disciplinary environment, you will drive cutting-edge innovation for different complex systems in power grid applications. Join our dynamic and motivated team to contribute to a sustainable energy future for all. How you'll make an impact You create impact:  Together with your team design innovative approaches for grid operation and deliver them as robust software modules You investigate:  Translate real power‑system problems into rigorous models and final solutions for the customers You take initiative:  Collaborate with a global and inter-disciplinary team of researchers and engineers in Hitachi Energy to drive the development from concept to production You connect:  Build relationships within the company and actively share your knowledge and expertise. Interact with local and global external partners including universities, start-ups, and vendors to integrate diverse perspectives and stakeholder inputs You communicate:  Be able to clearly communicate concepts to software developers, implementation engineering teams and customers. Produce clear design docs and developer-facing examples\/ notebooks that enable reuse. Your background Master Electrical\/Power Systems Engineering, Automation, Computer Science, Mathematics, or Master's degree with equivalent industry experience Proven expertise in modelling and steady-state analyses of power grids demonstrated hands-on expertise applying these methods in software development. Knowledge in mathematical optimization applied to power systems, and modern numerical solvers is strongly desired (e.g., MIP\/NLP, stochastic; tools such as Gurobi, CPLEX, Ipopt). Experience with machine learning and\/or artificial intelligence technologies is a plus Proficiency in C#, C++, Rust or a similar high-level programming language is required; Python and\/or Matlab for analytics and fast prototyping are a plus. Experience building state-of-the-art software engineering techniques (version control, code reviews, testing, CI\/CD) and integrating solution algorithms into applications are beneficial (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes). High performance computing skills such as parallel\/distributed computing, GPU, OpenMP or MPI would be beneficial Excellent communication skills in English, team player attitude, initiative and creativity   More about us    We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefits to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us, in work and out.  We can provide more information during the recruitment process.    Are you ready for a new exciting challenge? Does the above description sound like you? Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don't delay – apply today!  Dbamy o przejrzystość i zgodność z wymogami prawnymi tak, aby każda osoba uczestnicząca w procesie rekrutacyjnym wiedziała, czego może się spodziewać na poszczególnych etapach. Po pomyślnym zakończeniu procesu przedstawimy wybranej osobie szczegóły dotyczące warunków finansowych oraz benefitów. Pozostałe elementy oferty zostaną przekazane przed podpisaniem umowy o pracę, tak by stworzyć możliwość spokojnego zapoznania się z nimi. * Klauzula obowiązuje wyłącznie na terenie Polski ,  zgodnie z lokalnymi przepisami prawa. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully. *Applicable  only for Poland lo

Knowledge in mathematical optimization applied to power systems, and modern numerical solvers is strongly desired (e.g., MIP\/NLP, stochastic; tools such as Gurobi, CPLEX, Ipopt). Experience with machine learning and\/or artificial intelligence technologies is a plus Proficiency in C#, C++, Rust or a similar high-level programming language is required; Python and\/or Matlab for analytics and fast prototyping are a plus. Experience building state-of-the-art software engineering techniques (version control, code reviews, testing, CI\/CD) and integrating solution algorithms into applications are beneficial (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes). High performance computing skills such as parallel\/distributed computing, GPU, OpenMP or MPI would be beneficial Excellent communication skills in English, team player attitude, initiative and creativity   More about us    We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefits to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us, in work and out.  We can provide more information during the recruitment process.    Are you ready for a new exciting challenge? Does the above description sound like you? Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don't delay – apply today!  Dbamy o przejrzystość i zgodność z wymogami prawnymi tak, aby każda osoba uczestnicząca w procesie rekrutacyjnym wiedziała, czego może się spodziewać na poszczególnych etapach. Po pomyślnym zakończeniu procesu przedstawimy wybranej osobie szczegóły dotyczące warunków finansowych oraz benefitów. Pozostałe elementy oferty zostaną przekazane przed podpisaniem umowy o pracę, tak by stworzyć możliwość spokojnego zapoznania się z nimi. * Klauzula obowiązuje wyłącznie na terenie Polski ,  zgodnie z lokalnymi przepisami prawa. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully. *Applicable  only for Poland lo
descriptionByLocale.fr: Job Description The opportunity We are looking for a passionate and proficient industrial specialist with expertise in power system analysis\/ management and high-level programming. In an inter-disciplinary environment, you will drive cutting-edge innovation for different complex systems in power grid applications. Join our dynamic and motivated team to contribute to a sustainable energy future for all. How you'll make an impact You create impact:  Together with your team design innovative approaches for grid operation and deliver them as robust software modules You investigate:  Translate real power‑system problems into rigorous models and final solutions for the customers You take initiative:  Collaborate with a global and inter-disciplinary team of researchers and engineers in Hitachi Energy to drive the development from concept to production You connect:  Build relationships within the company and actively share your knowledge and expertise. jobs.title: Working Student Defectivity Engineering BIMOS 40% (f/m/d)
jobs.description:
The opportunity Are you passionate about semiconductors and eager to gain hands-on experience in industry? We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented student to join our dynamic team for at least 6 months, with the possibility to extend. As a Defectivity Engineering Working Student, you will have the opportunity to work on real-world projects, collaborate with experienced professionals, and contribute to ensuring the highest standards of our semiconductor product quality here in Lenzburg, Aargau.   How you'll make an impact Assist in identifying optical defects through non-destructive optical inspection  Support defectivity projects through data analysis and reporting on optical yield of our products Support regular maintenance of baseline and Pareto reporting systems Optimize and improve defect portfolio for various products Coordinate with various departments to correlate optical defects with equipment used in manufacturing process Your background Currently enrolled in a Bachelor's or Master's degree program in Materials Science, Engineering, Physics, or a related field Strong teamwork and communication skills Great attention to detail and persistence  Fluency in English, German language skills a plus Hands-on mentality and comfort working in a manufacturing environment More about us We are a technology-driven company with a strong focus on innovation, continuous improvement, and sustainable manufacturing. 
• We offer flexible working conditions, dedicated mentorship, and a supportive, inclusive environment where you can grow personally and professionally – empowering you to thrive while balancing life and work.

jobs.title: Installation Project Manager 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: Die Möglichkeit   In dieser Funktion übernimmst du am Standort Oerlikon die Organisation, Koordination und Führung aller Montage-, Inbetriebsetzungs- und Instandhaltungsarbeiten vor Ort. Du arbeitest eng mit internen und externen Kunden zusammen und stellst sicher, dass Projekte effizient, sicher und mit hoher Qualität umgesetzt werden.    Das kannst du bewirken   Verantwortung für die Abwicklung sowie die organisatorische Führung von Arbeiten vor Ort  Ansprechperson für interne und externe Kunden  Betreuung der zugeteilten Aussendienstmitarbeitenden und Erstellung von Montagezeitplänen unter Berücksichtigung von Ressourcen wie Verbrauchsmaterial, Werkzeug und Personal  Überwachung und Dokumentation von Projektfortschritt und - kosten (Reporting)  Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Sicherheitsvorschriften und Qualitätsanforderungen  Aktive Minimierung von Projektkosten und Risiken sowie prozessgerechte Bearbeitung von Abweichungsmeldungen inkl. Einleitung von Korrekturmassnahmen Vollständige Zusammenstellung, Ablage und Archivierung aller relevanten Dokumentationen (Red Marks, Prüfprotokolle, Berichte) zur As-Built-Erstellung sowie Verrechnung an den Kunden    Das bringst du mit   Technische Grundausbildung sowie mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Montage und\/oder Inbetriebnahme von GIS-Anlagen  Fundiertes technisches Verständnis; Führungserfahrung von Vorteil  Technikerschule \/ Technischer Kaufmann  Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift; weitere Sprachen von Vorteil  Sicheres Auftreten und überzeugende Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, insbesondere in der Zusammenarbeit mit unterschiedlichen Kulturen  Teamfähigkeit, Organisationsstärke sowie Durchsetzungsvermögen Bereitschaft zu weltweiten Baustellenbesuchen Gute Kenntnisse in SAP und MS Office​ ​Mehr über uns Bei Hitachi Energy setzen wir auf Vielfalt und Zusammenarbeit. Unterschiedliche Perspektiven stärken unsere Innovation und ermöglichen Lösungen, die unsere Energiezukunft nachhaltig prägen. Wenn du Teil eines globalen Teams sein möchtest, das gemeinsam Wirkung erzielt, freuen wir uns auf deine Bewerbung.

jobs.title: Global AI Prompting Engineer PGTR
jobs.description: The opportunity As part of our ongoing digital transformation journey, we are developing ACE, a cutting-edge Generative AI-powered platform designed to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of our Bid & Proposal Management process within the Transformers Business Unit. We are seeking a Prompt Engineer who will play a pivotal role in this initiative. This individual will be responsible for designing, testing, and optimizing domain-specific prompts that enable ACE to generate accurate, context-aware, and business-aligned outputs. The role requires a deep understanding of transformer industry, industrial equipment standards as well as basic understanding of prompt engineering best practices and GenAI model behavior, ensuring that ACE delivers high-quality responses tailored to complex business scenarios. The ideal candidate will collaborate closely with IT Experts, Subject Matter Experts, Business stakeholders, and Module Owners to break down complex business logic into domain-specific prompts. How you'll make an impact Develop, refine, and maintain prompt libraries for various transformer units\/factories. Implement advanced techniques like prompt chaining, context injection, and few-shot learning for enterprise-grade accuracy. Own prompt lifecycle management including versioning, traceability, and governance. Evaluate LLM responses for precision, compliance, and bias mitigation. Conduct A\/B testing and maintain performance dashboards for prompt effectiveness. Work closely with Module Owners, Subject Matter Experts, and Business Stakeholders to embed prompts into ACE workflows. Create clear documentation for prompt strategies and maintain best practices aligned with Hitachi Energy's AI Ethics Charter. Stay updated on emerging GenAI technologies, frameworks, and tools to enhance ACE capabilities. Implement and recommend best practices for prompting across different ACE modules. Your background Bachelor or master degree in electrical engineering Experience working in the transformer industry, with international standards and customer documentation. Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking. Strong linguistic and logical reasoning for crafting precise prompts. Strong understanding of NLP, context management, and token optimization. Ability to experiment and iterate to optimize outputs. Ability to understand business processes and translate them into ACE-specific prompts. Hands-on experience with LLMs and prompt engineering techniques. Strong interest in AI enterprise-grade solutions. Willingness to learn Python and experience with AI APIs services. Ability to work in Agile environments and manage multiple stakeholders. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. Analytical mindset with attention to detail. Empathy for end users and curiosity for experimentation. Commitment to ethical AI practices and continuous learning. Reduction in prompt failure rate and model hallucination. Improvement in accuracy of outputs by modules. Speed and scalability of prompt deployment across ACE modules within the Transformer Business Unit. Compliance with AI governance and security standards. More about us Be part of a global digital transformation initiative. Work on cutting-edge GenAI solutions. Collaborative culture with opportunities for career growth and innovation. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully. * * Applicable  only for Poland location align with local law regulations

descriptionByLocale.en: The opportunity As part of our ongoing digital transformation journey, we are developing ACE, a cutting-edge Generative AI-powered platform designed to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of our Bid & Proposal Management process within the Transformers Business Unit. We are seeking a Prompt Engineer who will play a pivotal role in this initiative. This individual will be responsible for designing, testing, and optimizing domain-specific prompts that enable ACE to generate accurate, context-aware, and business-aligned outputs. The role requires a deep understanding of transformer industry, industrial equipment standards as well as basic understanding of prompt engineering best practices and GenAI model behavior, ensuring that ACE delivers high-quality responses tailored to complex business scenarios. The ideal candidate will collaborate closely with IT Experts, Subject Matter Experts, Business stakeholders, and Module Owners to break down complex business logic into domain-specific prompts. How you'll make an impact Develop, refine, and maintain prompt libraries for various transformer units\/factories. Implement advanced techniques like prompt chaining, context injection, and few-shot learning for enterprise-grade accuracy. Own prompt lifecycle management including versioning, traceability, and governance. Evaluate LLM responses for precision, compliance, and bias mitigation. Conduct A\/B testing and maintain performance dashboards for prompt effectiveness. Work closely with Module Owners, Subject Matter Experts, and Business Stakeholders to embed prompts into ACE workflows. Create clear documentation for prompt strategies and maintain best practices aligned with Hitachi Energy's AI Ethics Charter. Stay updated on emerging GenAI technologies, frameworks, and tools to enhance ACE capabilities. Implement and recommend best practices for prompting across different ACE modules. Your background Bachelor or master degree in electrical engineering Experience working in the transformer industry, with international standards and customer documentation. Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking. Strong linguistic and logical reasoning for crafting precise prompts. Strong understanding of NLP, context management, and token optimization. Ability to experiment and iterate to optimize outputs. Ability to understand business processes and translate them into ACE-specific prompts. Hands-on experience with LLMs and prompt engineering techniques. Strong interest in AI enterprise-grade solutions. Willingness to learn Python and experience with AI APIs services. Ability to work in Agile environments and manage multiple stakeholders. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. Analytical mindset with attention to detail. Empathy for end users and curiosity for experimentation. Commitment to ethical AI practices and continuous learning. Reduction in prompt failure rate and model hallucination. Improvement in accuracy of outputs by modules. Speed and scalability of prompt deployment across ACE modules within the Transformer Business Unit. Compliance with AI governance and security standards. More about us Be part of a global digital transformation initiative. Work on cutting-edge GenAI solutions. Collaborative culture with opportunities for career growth and innovation. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully. * * Applicable  only for Poland location align with local law regulations

jobs.title: Junior Project Manager Site Service GCB 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity  The High Voltage Products division of Hitachi Energy is globally recognized as a specialist in systems for power transmission and distribution. At the Zurich Oerlikon location, Generator Circuit Breaker (GCB) systems and Gas Insulated Switchgear (GIS) are developed and manufactured for the reliable transmission and distribution of electrical energy. By using state-of-the-art development tools and methods, high reliability of switching systems and switchgear is ensured.  The Service organization is responsible for worldwide aftersales support of GCB and GIS systems, including training, installation and commissioning, scheduled maintenance, additional services, troubleshooting, extensions, retrofits, and replacements.  This role offers the opportunity to contribute to efficient and well-coordinated project execution in a global service environment. With a strong service mindset, attention to detail, and structured coordination skills, this position plays a key role in delivering high customer satisfaction and optimal project results.  How you'll make an impact  Responsibility for the execution, organizational leadership, and coordination of onsite commissioning and maintenance activities for Generator Circuit Breaker service projects  Acting as the main point of contact for internal and external customers during site activities  Support of assigned field service personnel, including the creation of installation and assembly schedules while considering required resources such as tools and personnel  Monitoring, documenting, and reporting project progress and costs  Ensuring compliance with safety regulations and quality assurance measures, while minimizing project costs and risks  Process compliant handling of deviations during onsite activities, including the initiation of appropriate corrective actions  Compilation, filing, and archiving of project documentation, including technical documents, test records, and reports  Responsibility for the billing of performed services to customers  Contribution to continuous improvement of processes and activities (CIP) to achieve consistently high customer satisfaction  Your background  Higher technical education (HF) or a comparable qualification  Further education in project management (IPMA or PMI) is considered an advantage  Practical experience in the installation and\/or commissioning of switchgear is beneficial  Solid technical knowledge and the ability to understand technical documentation, system interfaces, and operational constraints  Confident demeanor with strong communication skills, particularly in multicultural environments  Business fluent English and good knowledge of German  Strong team spirit combined with structured organizational skills  Assertiveness and leadership capability, with willingness to travel worldwide to construction sites  Good knowledge of SAP and MS Office  More about us   Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Incoming Quality Inspector 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description:
Über die Position In deiner vielseitigen Rolle als Incoming Quality Inspector arbeitest du in einem kleinen Team an unserem Standort in Dietlikon und bist mit diesem zusammen verantwortlich, dass unsere internationalen Kunden weiterhin mit den höchsten Qualitätsstandards und einem reibungslosen Betrieb ihrer Anlagen rechnen können. Du bist ein ausgewiesener Teamplayer und kannst anpacken? Du möchtest uns helfen, unsere ambitionierten Ziele für die Zukunft zu erreichen und zusammen mit uns das Service Logistics Center stetig weiter zu entwickeln? – Dann bewirb dich jetzt! 
• Wir bieten dir eine interessante und abwechslungsreiche Aufgabe in einem herausfordernden Umfeld. Das kannst du bewirken Qualitative und Quantitative Prüfung der Materialeingänge mittels mechanischer, elektrischer und optischer Messmittel sowie der dazugehörigen Dokumente Leiten \/ Unterstützen von 
• Aufgaben bei Qualitätsabweichungen Erfassen und verfolgen von Qualitätsabweichungen in SAP Schnittstellenübergreifende Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Teams wie Einkauf, Technik oder Auftragsabwicklung Stetiges verbessern unserer Qualität durch interne Prozessverbesserungen Umsetzung der 5S-Prinzipien Vorleben der Qualitätskultur als Vorbild Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene technische Berufsausbildung, z.B. Polymechanik, Industriemechanik, oder vergleichbare Ausbildung Sehr gutes Verständnis von technischen Zeichnungen, Messmittel, Material und Stücklisten Gute Kenntnisse in Microsoft Office sowie idealerweise Erfahrung im Umgang mit SAP Gute Deutschkenntnisse und Englischkenntnisse Hohe Leistungsbereitschaft und Motivation um den Standort im Team weiterzuentwickeln Lösungsorientiert und pragmatisch mit Sinn für Prozesse und übergeordnete Zusammenhänge Spass an Teamarbeit und gemeinsamer Erreichung von hochgesteckten Zielen Einwandfreier Leumund Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

• Aufgaben bei Qualitätsabweichungen Erfassen und verfolgen von Qualitätsabweichungen in SAP Schnittstellenübergreifende Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Teams wie Einkauf, Technik oder Auftragsabwicklung Stetiges verbessern unserer Qualität durch interne Prozessverbesserungen Umsetzung der 5S-Prinzipien Vorleben der Qualitätskultur als Vorbild Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene technische Berufsausbildung, z.B. Polymechanik, Industriemechanik, oder vergleichbare Ausbildung Sehr gutes Verständnis von technischen Zeichnungen, Messmittel, Material und Stücklisten Gute Kenntnisse in Microsoft Office sowie idealerweise Erfahrung im Umgang mit SAP Gute Deutschkenntnisse und Englischkenntnisse Hohe Leistungsbereitschaft und Motivation um den Standort im Team weiterzuentwickeln Lösungsorientiert und pragmatisch mit Sinn für Prozesse und übergeordnete Zusammenhänge Spass an Teamarbeit und gemeinsamer Erreichung von hochgesteckten Zielen Einwandfreier Leumund Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

jobs.title: Teamleiter Instandhaltung 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position  In unserem Profit Center   Überspannungsableiter   in Wettingen produzieren und offerieren wir innovative, zuverlässige und sichere Überspannungsschutzlösungen für die Segmente Stromerzeugung\/-verteilung sowie Railway und Industrie. Unser Anspruch dabei ist, dass wir unsere Kunden auf der ganzen Welt als Technologieführer mit Überspannungsschutzlösungen auf Weltniveau begeistern. Dies erreichen wir durch den stetigen Ausbau unserer Führerschaft in Kerntechnologien wie auch durch die ständige Verbesserung unserer Geschäftsprozesse.   Als Teamleiter Instandhaltung führen sie ein Team von 6 Personen tragen Sie die Gesamtverantwortung für die Instandhaltung aller Produktionsanlagen und technischen Systeme in einer hochautomatisierten Prozessfertigungsumgebung.  Ziel der Funktion ist die Sicherstellung einer hohen Anlagenverfügbarkeit, maximaler Sicherheit sowie einer effizienten und kostenoptimierten Instandhaltungsorganisation. Sie agieren als strategischer Partner der Geschäftsleitung und führen die Instandhaltung sowohl strategisch als auch operativ.  Das   können   Sie   bewirken    Strategische und operative Führung der Instandhaltungsorganisation  Planung, Steuerung und Umsetzung von Wartungs- und Instandhaltungsmaßnahmen (präventiv, korrektiv und ganzheitliche Instandhaltungskonzepte)  Entwicklung und Umsetzung von Instandhaltungsstrategien zur Steigerung von Anlagenverfügbarkeit, Produktivität und Anlagenlebensdauer  Fachliche und disziplinarische Führung sowie Weiterentwicklung des Instandhaltungsteams  Verantwortung für Budgetplanung, Kostenkontrolle sowie Ersatzteil- und Lagerstrategie  Unterstützung von Umbau-, Neubau- und Investitionsprojekten  Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Sicherheits-, Umwelt- und gesetzlichen Vorgaben  Kontinuierliche Verbesserung der Instandhaltungsprozesse sowie Einführung digitaler Tools und Kennzahlensysteme  Das bringen Sie mit  Abgeschlossenes technisches Studium im Bereich Ingenieurwesen, Mechatronik, Elektrotechnik, Automatisierungstechnik oder vergleichbare Qualifikation  Mehrjährige Führungs- und Instandhaltungserfahrung in einer Prozess- oder Serienfertigung mit hoher Automatisierung  Fundierte Kenntnisse in Automatisierungs-, Roboter- und industriellen Steuerungssystemen  Erfahrung mit strukturierten Instandhaltungsansätzen, kontinuierlicher Verbesserung und zustandsorientierter Wartung  Erfahrung in der Zusammenarbeit mit interdisziplinären Schnittstellen sowie im Management technischer Investitionsprojekte  Analytische, strukturierte und umsetzungsstarke Arbeitsweise mit ausgeprägter Führungskompetenz  Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse Mehr   über   uns  Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen Ihnen, Ihre persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

jobs.title: Global IT Manager for Business Unit Grid Automation
jobs.description: The opportunity The Grid Automation Business Unit of Hitachi Energy is seeking a dynamic Global IT Leader for the role of Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, to lead an existing team of over forty IT Professionals in supporting and advancing Grid Automation's global businesses and digital IT transformation initiatives. Business Solution Teams (BSTs) in each Business Unit (BU) have complete responsibility for managing BU-specific applications and Infrastructure services, including service delivery. They oversee and control these applications and services while adhering to global governance and security standards.  BSTs design and implement the IT Roadmap and Application Landscape for their respective BUs to align with business requirements. They closely collaborate with global departments to help deliver function-wide applications and enterprise platforms. How you will make an impact Lead Business relationship management with BUs including BST Leadership and guidance across BU\/HUB\/GPG\/Functions. Lead IT Demand Mgt to meet Business requirements. Management and governance of the BST IT organization to support and deliver on Demand priorities. Accountable for Application Management for BU specific applications, Infrastructure\/ Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management of BST assigned Sites. Support IT\/OT Cybersecurity Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management of BST assigned Sites. Digital Transformation IT Build Deployments to support growth of business. Accountable for the total IT offering to the business and provide interface to relevant IT partners, articulating the needs of the business to the relevant IT partners to ensure impactful support to the business. Ensure alignment of IT roadmap to business needs through communication and active feedback loops between stakeholders and IT organization. Define and implement strategic IT priorities in the organization in line with BU strategy and Strategic Business initiatives, covering business functions application landscape, utilizing the existing IT solutions portfolio or ensuring to provide new solutions, where appropriate. Understand the business demands, the current and long-term business strategy and translate them into opportunities for IT to add value to the business. Implement and ensure compliance with global and local standards, tools, processes related to operations\/projects execution. Analyze results of internal and external audits and identify common areas of improvement within the organization. Provide the BU escalation point for all IT related issues. Responsible for BST budget and investments and creating transparency on business unit IT costs. Setting standard documentation for audits and their records, findings and reports. Develop and share best practices across BST community. Foster communication between BU and IT organization. Ensure (with HR support) that the area of responsibility is properly organized, staffed, skilled and directed. Guides, motivates and develops direct and indirect subordinates within HR policies, for the benefit of both company and the employee. Your background Minimum 15+ years of professional working experience in IT. 10+ years' experience working in global and diverse organizations with understanding of Infrastructure, Applications and platforms. A bachelor's degree is required; a master's degree is preferred. Strong written and verbal communication skills. Highly organized with attention to detail. Proven success working in matrixed organizations. Capable of successfully leading remote teams across multiple time zones More about us: Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader that is advancing a sustainable energy future for all. We serve customers in the utility, industry and infrastructure sectors with innovative solutions and services across the value chain. Together with customers and partners, we pioneer technologies and enable the digital transformation required to accelerate the energy transition toward
